name: Steve Chabot
subject: Turning 100 in the Time of the Coronavirus
body:
Truly the Greatest Generation No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Turning 100 in the Time of the Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this time of the coronavirus, it seems that virtually every news story we see on TV, or read about in the newspapers, is concerning this deadly virus. And rightfully so. I've written about COVID-19 the last five weeks in this blog. Of course while the virus rages, most peoples' lives go on, and this week I wanted to focus on a small group of people among us - those who live for a century. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Helping Small Businesses](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-d/)
The coronavirus crisis has affected all of our lives in so many ways. Palm Sunday was just three days ago, and Easter is just four days ahead. Yet America's churches are all but empty. America's small businesses would normally be busy and thriving, but a significant number of them are shuttered. In this week's blog, I review three pieces of legislation Congress has recently passed to help small businesses, the backbone of our great nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Largest Rescue Package in American History](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the CARES Act (The Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act) which the President signed into law over the weekend. You may be interested to learn who will benefit from this $2.2 trillion bill, perhaps even you and your family. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Everything Will Be Okay](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog post, I discuss an encouraging initiative in a Georgia community to help local artists and lift everyone's spirits during these trying times. I also discuss recent legislation to alleviate the coronavirus crisis including the Senate's multitrillion-dollar coronavirus response package agreed upon late last night. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkikrkt-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

body:
Since January, I have said it is highly possible that the coronavirus originated in a Chinese laboratory near the city of Wuhan. This virology laboratory worked on coronaviruses from bats, and China’s research system is notorious for lax safety standards, dishonesty, and incompetence.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42274903&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTY2ODY4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0
Peter,

Since January, I have said it is highly possible that the coronavirus originated in a Chinese laboratory near the city of Wuhan. This virology laboratory worked on coronaviruses from bats, and China’s research system is notorious for lax safety standards, dishonesty, and incompetence.

The mainstream media attacked me and propagated lies and propaganda from the Chinese Communist Party.

Now, sources in the government confirm it is highly likely the virus came from a lab and the murderous Chinese regime covered it up—causing this global pandemic.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDIyNzQ5MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTY2ODY4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0
It’s important that we get to the bottom of this. But what’s even more important is that China’s murderous dictatorship pay for what it has done to the rest of the world.

Do you agree?

Sign this petition if you agree—China needs to pay for what they did to the world. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIyNzQ5MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTY2ODY4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0

China did this, and they need to be held accountable.

Let me know if you agree.

Tom

name: From the Desk of John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Never let a serious go to waste...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, they'll never let a serious crisis go to waste... * |
Dear Peter, Late last month, Senators from both parties had bargained back and forth to produce a bill intended to help America's economy - expand unemployment insurance, provide loans to large and small businesses so they don't have to lay off workers, and make direct payments to American families. **But when the Senate put a bill forward on the night of March 29, Senate Democrats voted NO.** What happened? Simple, Nancy Pelosi returned to Washington after a few days off and within hours, convinced Schumer they were losing the chance for huge political gains if they agreed to support a Senate Bill that might save the economy. **After all, Democrats NEVER let a serious crisis go to waste!** Pelosi showed Schumer they could force through a raft of radical liberal agenda items supported by AOC's far-left loyalists - _a large plurality of the Democrat Party's base_ \- and they could also take advantage of a weakened economy and millions of newly unemployed families to embarrass and ultimately beat Donald Trump. Initially, Pelosi and Schumer insisted on an outrageous list of items be inserted into the legislation before they would agree to support it. Among the insane items they demanded be inserted include: | ✗ | Free healthcare and voting rights for illegals
---|---
✗ | Reduce presidential power on immigration,
✗ | Aggressive carbon emission restrictions for airplanes,
✗ | New "diversity" offices in companies,
✗ | Government involvement in appointment of company board members,
✗ | More women and labor union members on company boards,
✗ | Bans on lobbying by corporations but not unions,
✗ | More funding for union-controlled schools,
✗ | Expand Obamacare,
✗ | Looser border security.
Do any of these things have anything at all to do with stopping the economic devastation that's on our doorstep?
NO! Of course, not!
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9xOJKP&)
Even in a national emergency, Democrats are hell-bent on destroying President Trump.
[Please read below and decide today to help!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=ESHfMPU&)
_For America,_
\- John

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, I trust you are being safe and are doing well in the midst of this pandemic. However, the Democrats are once again becoming "**Unhinged** " regarding COVID-19 and placing any blame they can on President Trump. Stars and Stripes Forever PAC's board member, Chuck Muth, summed it up quite simply in his March 30th newsletter called "Muth's Truths"...
---
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EVCkSY9&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EVgYGhE&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EwqKSOw&)
---
The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat President Trump. They impeached him... He was acquitted. Now they are trying to blame him for not handling the Coronavirus effectively and hold him responsible for the tragic deaths of our fellow Americans. **We must continue to fight against their lies and hatred to make sure that President Trump is re-elected. Our country's future depends on it!** [Please donate immediately](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EBfvI4l&) to keep our ads on the air in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota and New Mexico --- all carefully selected for high percentage of minority voters, a battleground state, and/or to defeat a radical socialist who hates America! Peter, if we're going to win in November... WE MUST STAY ON THE AIR AND EXPAND INTO OTHER BATTLEGROUND STATES IMMEDIATELY! [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFlxwlg&)"Mini Mike" Bloomberg just donated **$18 Million** to the DNC to help them defeat President Trump and has pledged to spend a total of **$2 BILLION** against him... Frankly, his money would be better spent helping out his state and fellow New Yorkers that have been hit so hard with the virus. But it seems he hates Donald Trump more than he loves his fellow man. Despicable to say the least. And now that Bernie is out, Sleepy Joe will get huge influxes of cold, hard cash! [Please, Peter, donate today to keep us on the air, dispelling the Liberals' Lies and fighting for President Trump.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShTeSB&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EE1aGQp&) Stay safe. Stay well. United together as caring Americans, we'll get through this and be all the stronger from what we learned. It's who we are... | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._

---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.

You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=3oXQV&mc=9B&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=ESAtIA4&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=3oXQV&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EyPUJfs&pt=change_details) at any time.

Fresh content is coming soon! On location in the Whiteaker with Doyle and super-volunteer husband Justin, who lends his cinematography skills to the campaign. They make a good team!
---
|
---
Dear supporters, The Eugene Register-Guard says it best: "Climate, immigration and health care [aren't] passion projects for DeFazio...DeFazio isn't the sort of representative who will make seismic changes in Washington, and he won't take flashy stands on issues important to many Oregonians..." Eugene's Register Guard is out with [the first newspaper endorsement](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1AA/ni0YAA/t.30z/4hAJVRsQTg2k4sY4jyMYQA/h1/9Keqjt2rNZ2OQD7Ygf3GCNJ17KhjkUCVUNxILqlweBXDXErLLtiGOCyAc18y1OeAo99LbJ-2Fedn69o2JS-2BsWsC8CS53Xz044Y-2FshFG4K2OWpmmc-2FFYymtvcLBUpeGadKS3vHz0AXuUPInR7oxYWwjzukXPUKw9Id60AJZuxgfEJ0VM9LZVXLgmYVUmb3VriAPFfvuYSf17xrIKRzmgQ0uujx41tgdMbT8jJzG9mVJJCbsXi-2Bph4y331CW7RIpJwQ-2FKaCVU7xSRr1BjAU6mF1C41hwPGxXL30ZwKxtC2GGA45-2FoutpBqXuxTYXC8AEmBHzj3rW6c7TBLInVc1fKWXTafBIiq9gnJeFycOTZ0q2pouqkhIMR0J4JHLy-2FqnCMt3w9cSPceLzlM7G6VD0DSYI4-2FdMI-2FNppFa88DCLJ4k9Fuc-3D/H3i5) of the election, which reads like a half-hearted nudge to support an uninspiring status quo, and cast aside your concerns for the most pressing issues facing our district today. We knew that the Guard would back DeFazio, but the tone of the endorsement is hardly ringing; its evident that our campaign is strong, our platform is resonating, and people in power are paying attention. As well they should: our numbers are surging. Since Senator Sanders suspended his campaign, we've been reaching out to Bernie supporters all over our district - of which there are many thousands. Folks are jumping into our phone banking trainings, donating online, and signing up for shifts on the texting team. Our movement is strong, grassroots, and growing. Even in an endorsement of my opponent, the narrative is that our campaign is energizing the base, more in touch with voters' concerns, and would take high profile stands to "make seismic changes in Washington." Sounds about right to me! Let's do this! We are one month out from this election and we need all hands on deck. This election will be won or lost in the next 3 weeks based on how many people we can contact, and since we can't knock doors, it's all about VFH (Volunteering from Home!). Now is the time. We have three shifts every day. Click the volunteer button to get started, and thank you for your support! Onward, Doyle
---

clean_body: | | | | Fresh content is coming soon! On location in the Whiteaker with Doyle and super-volunteer husband Justin, who lends his cinematography skills to the campaign. They make a good team! | Dear supporters, The Eugene Register-Guard says it best: "Climate, immigration and health care [aren't] passion projects for DeFazio...DeFazio isn't the sort of representative who will make seismic changes in Washington, and he won't take flashy stands on issues important to many Oregonians..." Eugene's Register Guard is out with of the election, which reads like a half-hearted nudge to support an uninspiring status quo, and cast aside your concerns for the most pressing issues facing our district today. We knew that the Guard would back DeFazio, but the tone of the endorsement is hardly ringing; its evident that our campaign is strong, our platform is resonating, and people in power are paying attention. As well they should: our numbers are surging. Since Senator Sanders suspended his campaign, we've been reaching out to Bernie supporters all over our district - of which there are many thousands. Folks are jumping into our phone banking trainings, donating online, and signing up for shifts on the texting team. Our movement is strong, grassroots, and growing. Even in an endorsement of my opponent, the narrative is that our campaign is energizing the base, more in touch with voters' concerns, and would take high profile stands to "make seismic changes in Washington." Sounds about right to me! Let's do this! We are one month out from this election and we need all hands on deck. This election will be won or lost in the next 3 weeks based on how many people we can contact, and since we can't knock doors, it's all about VFH (Volunteering from Home!). Now is the time. We have three shifts every day. Click the volunteer button to get started, and thank you for your support! Onward, Doyle | ENDORSEMENT ALERT | Rachel's Action Network is dedicated to electing women environmental champions and our campaign is so proud to earn this endorsement! Thank you for your support in this election, and for your leadership in the fight for people and the planet. Doyle is proud to stand beside this slate of women including sheroes Katie Porter, Elaine Luria, Jessica Cisneros, and our very own Khanh Pham who is running for Oregon House District 46 in Portland. . | | ANNOUNCEMENTS | | NEW DIGITAL AD GETTING NOTICED Our campaign has released a fun new ad on Facebook that is attracting supporters, donors, and new volunteers. Check out the video and share it to your friends and family! YARD SIGNS ARE COMING You've been asking for months and they're almost here. It's time for yard signs! Our goal is to distribute the first 200 this weekend. The campaign will deliver them sanitized, in a socially distant way. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Incredible news from President Trump
body:
I have always sought to answer the call to service
Peter,I have always sought to answer the call to service, and in doing so, I've served my state as Commissioner of Economic and Community Development and served my country as the United States Ambassador to Japan.Now, President Trump has asked me to help on the economic advisory board.Team Hagerty will continue to volunteer in Tennessee as we fight the spread of the coronavirus and deal with its effects.I'm running for Senate because I want to fight for Tennessee families and preserve the American way of life we love so much.And right now, the best way for me to do that is to work alongside President Donald Trump to get our economy growing again.You can [**read more about the announcement here.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nutdilt-fuutjhhtj-r/) Thank you for your time.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nutdilt-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nutdilt-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nutdilt-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nutdilt-fuutjhhtj-i/)

**What an honor.** For years, Senator Sherrod Brown has demonstrated his genuine commitment to the people of Ohio and this country. With an unflinching voice, he stands up for the dignity of work, for equal rights, for affordable healthcare, for a world where everyone has the opportunity to succeed. **I share this vision and am so honored to have earned his endorsement** **in my race for State Senate District 18** _While Senator Brown fights for us in the U.S. Senate,_ _I want to fight for you here in the Ohio State Senate._ **_Sherrod Brown knows this seat is important and we can win it,_** **_but only with your support._** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BjG4TPmHAaEyFb-Zf8iRqBlkVI6ktsDV_bZF0AKD7Rg=/N8Ymx2Z0fq8RJHYNQLhtozJcImQBp_8YiTvOi6fcfUY=?refcode=brown1) **I hope you can join our team by donating today.** **Thank you and stay well.** **Sincerely,**

name: U.S. Congressman Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m endorsing Teresa for United States Senate in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
I am supporting Mayor Teresa Tomlinson to be the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate to face and defeat Republican David Perdue. | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17159951/184742366/-1995878082?refcode=em041620&refcode2=2ef4e22a-f47f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWY0ZTIyYS1mNDdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4XyMlmqKY64AJppYdNV3MJP865tKhVR9ivZl1XEM4Q=) **** | | Friend,

As a U.S. Congressman, I know the importance of a candidate who is ready to get the job done no matter the obstacles in the way. That is why **I am supporting Mayor Teresa Tomlinson to be the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate** to face and defeat Republican David Perdue. Teresa is the only candidate in the field who has won elections in Georgia. She has not only governed; she has governed well with a proven track record of success. As Georgia’s last Democratic Senator Max Cleland said: **Teresa is the only candidate who will be ready on Day One.**

In 2018, inspired by all the new energy and determination I was seeing across the nation, I set out to boost and fund some of the best young candidates — we called them the Future 40. We won 29 of those races, the key to our House majority and our power to fight for justice. Now, with Senate leadership more important than ever, I'm doing all I can to help retake the majority there, too. Democrats can win this and transform our government for years to come.

**These are serious times for serious, experienced leaders like Teresa Tomlinson.** Teresa led Columbus, Georgia for 8 years as mayor, public safety director and head of Homeland Security. She is the leader I trust to take this fight to David Perdue and help Democrats take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell.

**[We need a Democratic Senate majority to continue the work made possible by the massive gains we made in 2018. I’m proud to endorse a woman who will help us change Washington and serve Georgia. I ask you to join me by making a donation to Teresa Tomlinson’s campaign for U.S. Senate today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17159952/184742367/-1995878082?refcode=em041620&refcode2=2ef4e22a-f47f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWY0ZTIyYS1mNDdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4XyMlmqKY64AJppYdNV3MJP865tKhVR9ivZl1XEM4Q=)** | |

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: adopt a voter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,
I’d like to tell you what we are focusing on this month, and ask for your help.
We are trying to raise $3,500 towards funding our ‘adopt a voter’ program. This program is designed to target new and unlikely voters at a personal level, increasing voter turnout and enthusiasm – and right now we need help paying for things like stamps and printing costs. Outreach at this capacity is expensive but necessary. Right now it is more important than ever to engage folks that might not otherwise vote.
We understand why some people prefer to give to individual campaigns – but this is an opportunity to capitalize on the resources the WVDP has to be more efficient and smarter. This is how we will beat Republicans in 2020.
Will you help us by making a donation right now - and help us fund this exciting program? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
November is coming quickly, and we have to come together and mobilize as Democrats. We’re all in this together!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP

subject: DIG2020 2.0

Peter,
I’d like to tell you what we are focusing on this month, and ask for your help.
We are trying to raise $10,000 to help fund a new digital program for our candidates. The program will cost in excess of $100k, but an extremely generous donor has agreed to cover the rest if we can raise the first $10k. This program gives our candidates cutting edge data visualization tools, and allows us to provide important insights at the district and precinct levels. With social distancing being the new normal, we are staying ahead of the curve by continuing to offer state of the art digital services to all of our candidates.
We understand why some people prefer to give to individual campaigns – but this is an example of how we can come together as a state party to be more efficient and smarter. This is how we can beat Republicans in 2020.
Will you help us by making a donation right now - and help us fund this exciting program? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
November is coming quickly, and it is more important than ever to come together and mobilize as Democrats. We’re all in this together!

clean_body: [] Peter, I’d like to tell you what we are focusing on this month, and ask for your help. We are trying to raise $10,000 to help fund a new digital program for our candidates. The program will cost in excess of $100k, but an extremely generous donor has agreed to cover the rest if we can raise the first $10k. This program gives our candidates cutting edge data visualization tools, and allows us to provide important insights at the district and precinct levels. With social distancing being the new normal, we are staying ahead of the curve by continuing to offer state of the art digital services to all of our candidates. We understand why some people prefer to give to individual campaigns – but this is an example of how we can come together as a state party to be more efficient and smarter. This is how we can beat Republicans in 2020. Will you help us by making a donation right now - and help us fund this exciting program? [] November is coming quickly, and it is more important than ever to come together and mobilize as Democrats. We’re all in this together! [] Thank you, [] -- Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. name: Stephen Stepanek
subject: NHGOP is still organizing, recruiting, and planning to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Hello Derek,
I wanted to send you a note during these uncertain times to give you an update as to what the New Hampshire Republican Party is doing and how we are continuing our efforts to organize, recruit, and train Republicans across the State of New Hampshire to ensure a victorious November election is on the horizon.
Just this week I have been on Zoom video calls with our county and city chairs along with our Vice Chair Pamela Tucker and House Republican Leader Dick Hinch to examine the current state of candidate recruitment and bring focus to areas we need to recruit in before candidates file in 7 weeks.
The NHGOP & Trump Victory staff have been hard at work fielding questions from activists, organizing our latest online petition, and managing the transition to this new digitally organized world. Since the beginning of March our team has contacted over 90,000 voters by phone and held 50 activist trainings activating over 350 volunteers.
In short, the New Hampshire Republican Party is active and prepared to handle this current crisis and continue to hold the Democrats accountable.
One of the biggest changes we face is the different approach we have to take to getting Republicans out to vote in November. In light of this, we need to switch our focus and budget to support a robust mail and digital advertising program along with increased remote phone-banking to reach voters.
That's why I am reaching out and providing you with this update today. Now more than ever we need your support in order to have the resources needed for victory. Our competition isn't slowing down and we aren't either which is why we need your help to have the resources to properly fight back.
[Donate $10 to help us reach out to 500 voters digitally](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDAwNjc2MjkxMjM3MTI0MDA0JmM9YTRqMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzg0OTI3NTImZD1iNXozZDNh.I-yAQW3Er9ft-vBDfq3mFoJ8tPbk-kzEMxooeyl3FhM)
[Donate $20 to help us call 1000 voters](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDAwNjc2MjkxMjM3MTI0MDA0JmM9YTRqMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzg0OTI3NTQmZD10OW8wdzhy.Y5ygE0ssuU4MI4rtgYum6PQ7rQDxRXleBGgXbIx11nM)
[Donate $30 to do both!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDAwNjc2MjkxMjM3MTI0MDA0JmM9YTRqMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzg0OTI3NTYmZD1zNWE5eThq.LSKITa68OK0YOGefItxDKYzDUAFVZD0rrWNcTRVdX2w)
The NHGOP is ready and prepared to elect Republicans across the State of New Hampshire during these times. [I hope you can support us in that effort.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDAwNjc2MjkxMjM3MTI0MDA0JmM9YTRqMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzg0OTI3NTgmZD1tOHk2eDFn.EdOWfQXvndJaLI3NBQHjSDXpxi0J-YINYznv3kujAiw)

Regards,
Stephen Stepanek
NHGOP Chair

subject: Is THIS The Government You Want?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17162197/184783169/-1907457918?refcode=04032020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjcwMDVmZC0wMzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_8_QqpUbYvu4BA9xtWP_s2BUaBySZ1VBR6-3X6EPSs=)

Dear Friend, My philosophy of government is simple - it should be as transparent to our daily lives as possible, while assuring equal rights and opportunity for all, making the necessary investments to assure our success for generations to come, and being prepared to protect our people in times of crisis. If you share in this belief, [I need your help to make sure we're represented in Washington](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17162198/184783171/-1907457919?refcode=04162020_em_button><span style=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjcwMDVmZC0wMzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_8_QqpUbYvu4BA9xtWP_s2BUaBySZ1VBR6-3X6EPSs=). | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17162199/184783172/1282705599?refcode=04162020_em_button><span style=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjcwMDVmZC0wMzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_8_QqpUbYvu4BA9xtWP_s2BUaBySZ1VBR6-3X6EPSs=)
---
There have been many high profile and well documented misjudgments by this administration that have led us to this point in the COVID-19 pandemic. But there has also been a decades-long erosion of investment in our public health institutions and our health care system that has left us particularly vulnerable to this event.
This is not a point in time event. It has been decades in the making, and it may take decades to fully recover.
Of the remaining candidates to be your next representative, none share my vision or have decades of experience in complex problem solving. Unfortunately, in our system, it takes more than vision and experience to win an election. It takes resources to get our message out. It takes support from all of us. [So please, show your support with a contribution today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17162200/184783173/-1907457918?refcode=04162020_em_line&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjcwMDVmZC0wMzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_8_QqpUbYvu4BA9xtWP_s2BUaBySZ1VBR6-3X6EPSs=).

name: Gary Peters
subject: this is a HUGE opportunity!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Losing in Michigan would mean McConnell gets another two years of Senate control
| | |
---
Friend - our opponent announced he has broken fundraising records and outraised us for the third straight reporting period.
I'll be frank, friend: Democrats will not flip the Senate if we lose in Michigan. That's why the GOP has made it clear they will dump _MILLIONS_ into Michigan to defeat me and buy this seat to expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

That's why this news couldn't have come at a better time: **After learning we were outraised by our opponent again, a group of fired-up donors just stepped up to match all donations up to our $25,000 goal -** **but _only_ until midnight tonight! **

If we're going to win here, I'm counting on supporters like you to take full advantage of this match opportunity before it expires at midnight: **[Will you give $3 or more now- and have every dollar DOUBLED - to defend Michigan's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da7ac/5721a3ed/7f9428da/efb8452/1922799043/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGszODgtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk388-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Losing in Michigan would mean McConnell gets another two years of Senate control - more than enough time to confirm even more extremist Supreme Court justices and succeed in dismantling the ACA. **It's never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority.**
The good news is Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats have a path to take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. But here's the deal - in a race this close, every single dollar matters when the future of the Senate is at stake.

**If we're going to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats, I'll need you with me. This rare match opportunity is only on the table until midnight tonight, so I'm counting on you to take full advantage before it's too late:**
**[Please, rush $3 right now- anything you can spare before midnight - and have your gift DOUBLED to defend Michigan's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats!](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da7ac/5721a3ed/7f9428da/efb8452/1922799043/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGszODgtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk388-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

clean_body: Losing in Michigan would mean McConnell gets another two years of Senate control | | | Friend - our opponent announced he has broken fundraising records and outraised us for the third straight reporting period. I'll be frank, friend: Democrats will not flip the Senate if we lose in Michigan. That's why the GOP has made it clear they will dump MILLIONS into Michigan to defeat me and buy this seat to expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate. That's why this news couldn't have come at a better time: After learning we were outraised by our opponent again, a group of fired-up donors just stepped up to match all donations up to our $25,000 goal - but only until midnight tonight! If we're going to win here, I'm counting on supporters like you to take full advantage of this match opportunity before it expires at midnight: "" Losing in Michigan would mean McConnell gets another two years of Senate control - more than enough time to confirm even more extremist Supreme Court justices and succeed in dismantling the ACA. It's never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority. The good news is Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats have a path to take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. But here's the deal - in a race this close, every single dollar matters when the future of the Senate is at stake. If we're going to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats, I'll need you with me. This rare match opportunity is only on the table until midnight tonight, so I'm counting on you to take full advantage before it's too late: "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you for keeping up the fight. -Gary | We know that for so many people, this is an incredibly challenging and uncertain time, so please only chip in if you are able. If you would like to pause fundraising emails from us for the time being, please "" to temporarily receive fewer emails from our campaign. name: Jason Yates
subject: COVID-19 Pandemic Survey - your voice is needed
body:
Peter,
My Faith Votes is conducting a nationwide survey that will be shared on national news outlets. We are asking for your help in this important survey as we greatly value your input.
The COVID-19 pandemic has dramatically affected nearly every American. Amid all the changes and challenges, it’s critical that our nation’s leaders know how people of faith view this pandemic.
Please answer these ten survey questions. It will take you less than three minutes. You can take the survey here: **[https://myfaithvotes.org/covid-19-pandemic-survey](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ibMzrge1zBfOv81lusjLGlBNT3IRn-QcmOx_I0KcW_xIPQqXuHO6thjSL6EZluwt4WD3DZQ6yXGjI7tAXSo4-ac&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200416srv01&n=1)**
I know you’re busy, but your voice is very important. We are working hard to ensure people of faith are heard at the national level.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ibMzrge1zBfOv81lusjLGlBNT3IRn-QcmOx_I0KcW_xIPQqXuHO6thjSL6EZluwt4WD3DZQ6yXGjI7tAXSo4-ac&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200416srv01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200416srv01&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200416srv01&n=4).

Thanks to grassroots support from people like you, cons.firstname , we're well on our way to hitting our Mid-Month Goal for April -- but we're not there yet! Unlike Sen. Cornyn, we aren't taking money from corporate PACs, so goals like this are only reachable because we have a massive team that believes in MJ.

**[Make your first* donation toward our $25,000 mid-month goal today (if you can) to get your name added to our list of donors!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034d/7f51f7bc/4f57f460/4ef12ce9/3697716229/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.1nd__1232__&amount=10")**

We know that _everyone_ on this team is passionate about electing MJ for so many reasons: from protecting their health care and reproductive rights to keeping our communities safe from gun violence. Together, we'll kick Sen. Cornyn out of Washington and send MJ to fight for us in his place.

**If you can, help us hit this crucial goal by making your first donation today.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Collins
subject: New Ad: Senator Collins Highlights Maine Companies and Workers Fighting COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Maine workers at so many companies, big and small, in our great state are putting people first during the coronavirus pandemic. These companies are retooling operations to make protective equipment for medical workers, staying open to make sure Mainers can get essential items like food, and using that classic Maine spirit of innovation to create medical equipment that will be critical in fighting this global pandemic.

**New Ad: Senator Collins Highlights Maine Companies and Workers Fighting COVID-19**
Maine workers at so many companies, big and small, in our great state are putting people first during the coronavirus pandemic.
These companies are retooling operations to make protective equipment for medical workers, staying open to make sure Mainers can get essential items like food, and using that classic Maine spirit of innovation to create medical equipment that will be critical in fighting this global pandemic.
[**In a new video, Senator Susan Collins highlights the work of some of these employers and their employees.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDIyNzc3NzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTczMTIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Abbott Labs in Scarborough is pushing the boundaries of medical science by creating new coronavirus tests that will save lives.
L.L. Bean and New Balance have turned from making Bean Boots and running shoes to making medical equipment needed to keep medical personnel safe.
And Puritan Medical Products in Guilford is working to make diagnostic equipment used all over the world to fight coronavirus.
Workers at these companies, and so many more, are wonderful examples of the good old-fashioned Maine work ethic. There's an important job to do, and so they're doing it.
We thank them, and we also thank you. Without your sacrifices, the impact of coronavirus would be much worse than it already is.
[**Please take a look at the video today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIyNzc3NzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTczMTIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
Friend,

Montanans and all Americans are going through a difficult time right now, but by working together we will get through this crisis.
It certainly has been an unconventional start to 2020. Before Coronavirus suspended our normal campaign schedule, we were amazed to see how active the D.C. special interests were focusing on our state.
And yesterday, my team caught wind of a virtual fundraiser that Hillary Clinton held to boost the campaign of our far Left opponent Whitney Williams. Williams is the same candidate who called me an existential threat to Montana.
In 2016, Montanans and Americans everywhere voted to keep Hillary out of the White House because we knew her agenda didn't line up with our values. However, our far Left opponent would rather cling to Hillary and the checkbooks of the Democrat party establishment, than our Montana values and way of life.
Even before this, Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and D.C. Swamp Democrats were working on a plan that involved using high dollar donors and Super PACs to sway the election in Montana. And with Hillary now getting involved, it's confirmed that the far Left has made Montana a top target this year.

clean_body: Friend, Did you see that Hillary Clinton held a virtual fundraiser for Whitney Williams on Tuesday?D.C. special interests are ramping up their efforts to interfere in our state 's Governor's race this November! First, Chuck Schumer directed failed liberal presidential candidate Steve Bullock to run for Montana's Senate seat so that national Democrat donors would have reason to spend even more money in our state this Fall. Then, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi started orchestrating a plan that involved using their high dollar donors and Super PACs to sway this election. And now, Hillary Clinton is supporting one of our far Left opponents after she held a virtual fundraiser on her behalf on Tuesday. Friend, in order to prevent the far Left from being successful in their efforts to influence our election this November, we're going to need the help of conservatives like you to take action today. == == == == == == Thank you, Team Gianforte == PAID FOR BY GREG FOR MONTANA, REPUBLICAN P.O. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 ==** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

body:
We just got word of a brand new poll in Kansas (just released yesterday) -- check out the results:

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163192/184803420/302230496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzY0MjdhOC0wYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOHb97aBB4fMlr72vP7lTGg6zUaGQvdnXxAr8qP2QJI=&emci=65b2c451-6e7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=476427a8-0c80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10862544)

| | Team, We just got word of a brand new poll in Kansas (just released yesterday) -- check out the results: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163193/184803421/1785603200?refcode=em200415i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzY0MjdhOC0wYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOHb97aBB4fMlr72vP7lTGg6zUaGQvdnXxAr8qP2QJI=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163194/184803422/1785603200?refcode=em200415i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzY0MjdhOC0wYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOHb97aBB4fMlr72vP7lTGg6zUaGQvdnXxAr8qP2QJI=)** This is great news! In the last independent poll of this race in February, we were tied with likely Republican nominee Kris Kobach at 43%. This proves that momentum is on our side. But our 2 point lead is still within the margin-of-error, and Kobach’s special interest allies have already committed to spending millions to support him. We need your help _right now_ to defeat them and build on our lead. [**That’s why I’m setting a $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal. Team, will you pitch in $5 now to help keep our campaign on track to win this November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163195/184803423/1785603200?refcode=em200415i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzY0MjdhOC0wYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOHb97aBB4fMlr72vP7lTGg6zUaGQvdnXxAr8qP2QJI=) Here are our top takeaways from this poll:
1. Kansans believe in our message of sending a voice of reason to the Senate.
2. Special interests are going to continue meddling in this race to try and boost Kobach.
3. 13% of Kansans are still undecided in this race -- we need to convince them to stand with us!

We can absolutely win this Senate seat and send a voice of reason to Washington. But we need to be doing everything we can to keep up our momentum, and with the serious public health concerns posed by the COVID-19 pandemic, we can’t hold any of the in-person campaign events we had previously planned. **Unfortunately, that means we’ll have a huge gap in our April fundraising numbers -- unless this grassroots team can step up in a big way and help us get over the finish line.** **[Team, make a $5 contribution now to help us build on the momentum of this poll and show you’re with me in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163196/184803424/1785603200?refcode=em200415i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzY0MjdhOC0wYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOHb97aBB4fMlr72vP7lTGg6zUaGQvdnXxAr8qP2QJI=)** This public health crisis means I’m relying on our online fundraising efforts now more than ever. You have all had my back throughout this campaign, and I am so grateful for your continued support. I know I can count on you to help us meet our ambitious mid-month goal so we don’t fall behind in this race. Thank you, Barbara Bollier **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163197/184803425/1785603200?refcode=em200415i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzY0MjdhOC0wYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOHb97aBB4fMlr72vP7lTGg6zUaGQvdnXxAr8qP2QJI=)**

clean_body: We just got word of a brand new poll in Kansas (just released yesterday) -- check out the results: | | | Team, We just got word of a brand new poll in Kansas (just released yesterday) -- check out the results: = = This is great news! In the last independent poll of this race in February, we were tied with likely Republican nominee Kris Kobach at 43%. This proves that momentum is on our side. But our 2 point lead is still within the margin-of-error, and Kobach’s special interest allies have already committed to spending millions to support him. We need your help right now to defeat them and build on our lead. = Here are our top takeaways from this poll: 1. Kansans believe in our message of sending a voice of reason to the Senate. 2. Special interests are going to continue meddling in this race to try and boost Kobach. 3. 13% of Kansans are still undecided in this race -- we need to convince them to stand with us! We can absolutely win this Senate seat and send a voice of reason to Washington. But we need to be doing everything we can to keep up our momentum, and with the serious public health concerns posed by the COVID-19 pandemic, we can’t hold any of the in-person campaign events we had previously planned. Unfortunately, that means we’ll have a huge gap in our April fundraising numbers -- unless this grassroots team can step up in a big way and help us get over the finish line. = This public health crisis means I’m relying on our online fundraising efforts now more than ever. You have all had my back throughout this campaign, and I am so grateful for your continued support. I know I can count on you to help us meet our ambitious mid-month goal so we don’t fall behind in this race. Thank you, Barbara Bollier = This campaign is powered by grassroots donors. Please =. We're counting on supporters like you, but if you'd like fewer emails from us, and if you'd like to unsubscribe, | Barbara Bollier for U.S. Senate PO Box 1647 Mission, KS 66222 United States | Paid for by Bollier for Kansas

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: Uninsured Americans are counting on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
One signature can make a huge difference. |
#
Friends, As millions of Americans grapple with navigating this global health crisis, we need to make sure that everyone who needs health services has access to them for their loved ones and themselves. **That 's why today we're calling on Donald Trump to direct the Department of Health and Human Services to open up the Affordable Care Act health exchanges online to allow millions of Americans without coverage to get health insurance from the marketplace.** [**If you agree that we need to expand access to affordable health care and open the ACA exchanges up for a special enrollment period, we need your signature on this petition today >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/open-the-exchanges-covid-19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+If+you+agree+that+we+need+to+expand+acce&utm_campaign=em200416&source=em200416") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/open-the-exchanges-covid-19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em200416&source=em200416")
---
Leaving so many without health insurance in the midst of a global health crisis is unacceptable. Cory was the first lawmaker in Congress to propose legislation that would reopen the exchanges for a special enrollment period for those impacted by the coronavirus. If passed, Cory's bill would help people get the coverage they need before the regularly scheduled open enrollment period in November and December.
**Republicans are still doing everything they can to strike down the ACA in the courts and undermine it every step of the way. But especially now, it should be easier, not harder, for Americans to receive health care coverage.**
[**If you 're with us, add your name today >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/open-the-exchanges-covid-19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+If+yoursquore+with+us+add+your+name+toda&utm_campaign=em200416&source=em200416")
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/open-the-exchanges-covid-19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em200416&source=em200416")
---
Thanks for taking the time to join us today on this increasingly important issue.
Team Cory

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

name: Mark Warren
subject: This feels a little strange
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/a5Ei-Zn7nerAxlKtLt_pdY-pHpDBV_hi_C5ktJlVuMg=/PPvM1qj12Kt72-4Cg5DlOBev0VW3hRPeZ61fjFk6-vE=?refcode=041620)
| | Friend, I hope you're doing well and staying healthy. **It feels a little strange writing a fundraising email now but we really need your help. ** Like other supporter funded organizations, the House DFL is having to adapt to a COVID-19 world. We've canceled events, house parties, and door knocks for the foreseeable future and we've replaced them with virtual town halls and online meetings. Unfortunately, the costs of communicating with voters via ads on tv and online will either stay consistent or worse they'll skyrocket. That's why we have to stay on track. **You can use the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund (PCR) Program to donate $50 per person (or $100 per couple)_and receive a full refund from the state._** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/a5Ei-Zn7nerAxlKtLt_pdY-pHpDBV_hi_C5ktJlVuMg=/PPvM1qj12Kt72-4Cg5DlOBev0VW3hRPeZ61fjFk6-vE=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=041620) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/a5Ei-Zn7nerAxlKtLt_pdY-pHpDBV_hi_C5ktJlVuMg=/PPvM1qj12Kt72-4Cg5DlOBev0VW3hRPeZ61fjFk6-vE=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=041620) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ A fact of life is that the Republicans will always be able to raise money. **A shortened calendar favors Republicans.** No fundraising events or meetings favors them. Major special interest funders won't miss a beat. **That 's why we need your help. ** Thank you for your support and for your consideration during this difficult time. Sincerely, **Mark Warren ** Finance Director P.S. Thank you again for considering this request. Stay safe and stay healthy. [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/a5Ei-Zn7nerAxlKtLt_pdY-pHpDBV_hi_C5ktJlVuMg=/PPvM1qj12Kt72-4Cg5DlOBev0VW3hRPeZ61fjFk6-vE=?refcode=041620)

name: Rita Hart
subject: Following up re: Iowa’s Second District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/NShCr5KqkifUjzAdshE029Roz9QdfdcLMm69DeQGaT4=/vwi4xUTuMOjJNwvL-WPMmHbvLa2I5uqShtGHcRX1yCM=)._
* * *
In order to keep listening to every voice in IA-02, we're looking into all of our opportunities to keep connecting with voters. Now, more than ever, it's critical we hear what Iowans need from our healthcare system, and how we can best preserve Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. **[Help us keep the conversation going with a donation towards my campaign. We need as many grassroots donors as possible to step up now so we're in a good position by tonight at midnight. name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Important Voter Notice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, The upcoming election on June 23rd is critical to ensuring we send strong conservative leadership to Washington. Democrats are playing political games and holding up critical legislation needed to support people and small businesses all across America. President Trump endorsed me because he knows I'm ready to fight to put Western New York and America First, and get the job done. I will fight alongside him to defeat COVID-19 and the challenges it has created. [**That all starts with this crucial election on June 23rd. In an effort to ensure the safety and health of all voters, anyone can apply to vote by absentee ballot.**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/2XtqaUDcnCC6sFExy43l4w/6J2T763uljOe73GZ0JfbmIeQ) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/5YbCgtgjSc61HiSuI61hSA/6J2T763uljOe73GZ0JfbmIeQ) If you would like to receive an absentee ballot application [click here](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/J763LeAeolSx2Cxipqei0UPQ/6J2T763uljOe73GZ0JfbmIeQ). My campaign will reach out and get you the necessary application so you can request your absentee ballot. If you have any other questions please reach out to my campaign at info@jacobs4congress.com and I will keep you up to date with any election developments and changes. Thank you for your continued support and stay safe. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs P.S. It is imperative that we keep those around us safe during this time. I urge you to forward this email to as many friends and family as you can so they can safely practice their right to vote.

body:
Greg is joining a bipartisan coalition of colleagues in demanding the implementation of vote by mail for every voter.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ri86Owhu1wotY-OwXuo9Jz196q7YQMzicOwQb1ddyDI=/DH1IC0oEC4WNa59f4gbckTHn0sDX-v1lwsFP7OXjTfk=)

[✎ **SIGN ON IF YOU BELIEVE EVERY VOTER SHOULD HAVE THE OPTION TO VOTE BY MAIL **✎](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ri86Owhu1wotY-OwXuo9Jz196q7YQMzicOwQb1ddyDI=/DH1IC0oEC4WNa59f4gbckTHn0sDX-v1lwsFP7OXjTfk=)

* * *

Greg and a bipartisan coalition of his colleagues in Congress understand that it is just commonsense for the United States to reform our voting process during this COVID-19 emergency to make sure every voter can vote safely and securely away from the potential spread of the contagion.

**That 's why he is supporting efforts to implement a universal vote by mail option for every voter in the country for November's election like we have here in Arizona. **

Look, this is a matter of keeping Americans safe and protecting the integrity of our electoral process during such a pivotal year.

[**Will you add your name to this petition to join Greg in support of a universal vote by mail option?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ri86Owhu1wotY-OwXuo9Jz196q7YQMzicOwQb1ddyDI=/DH1IC0oEC4WNa59f4gbckTHn0sDX-v1lwsFP7OXjTfk=)

Thank you for for taking action,

\-- _Team Stanton _

name: Team Eugene
subject: 🕒 The clock is ticking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Yesterday, we upped our April fundraising goal and need to raise an additional $10,000 before Friday to fight back against the far-right special interest groups and super PACs pouring money into our race in an effort to prop up Scott Perry.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17163542/184818677/460726911?&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.04.16_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=b37e44ee-1280-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzdlNDRlZS0xMjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnPrKsIsTTz8UB_m75N5ltoGfgXXIB3EGo-Kq9pLHEs=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team,

**Yesterday, we upped our April fundraising goal and need to raise an additional $10,000 before Friday to fight back against the far-right special interest groups and super PACs pouring money into our race in an effort to prop up Scott Perry.

We’re almost halfway to our goal, but we still need to raise $5,755 _by tomorrow_ to stand up against this kind of big money influence and flip PA-10 blue.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats Need to Stop Holding Small-Business Help Hostage
body:
"It’s beyond tragic: The loan program to aid small businesses hit by lockdowns is almost out of cash, yet Democrats still refuse..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e3bb41e66&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Democrats Need to Stop Holding Small-Business Help Hostage**

“It’s beyond tragic: The loan program to aid small businesses hit by lockdowns is almost out of cash, yet Democrats still refuse to OK new funds unless their unrelated demands are met,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“If small-business closures spike, costing countless workers their jobs, Americans shouldn’t forget the Dems’ cynicism.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4987059536&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“It’s time for Democrats to stop proposing sweeping partisan plans that predate this crisis”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2943fcf207&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Beginning with the Trump Administration’s “work to evacuate more than 800 Americans and people of other nationalities from Wuhan, China, in January and February, as of April 15 we’ve repatriated more than 62,000 Americans from more than 100 countries on nearly 600 flights—a staggering number in a very short time,” Secretary of State Mike Pompeo writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a20e98dcc1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “CNN this week published a report copying almost word-for-word a Chinese Communist Party press release praising the People’s Liberation Army Navy’s efforts to contain the coronavirus and degrading the U.S. Navy’s failures to do likewise.” In other words, CNN is reciting propaganda from the Chinese government nearly verbatim, Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=983224665e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump was right to announce Tuesday that he will immediately stop funding the World Health Organization, which was scheduled to get $893 million from the U.S. in the current two-year funding period. The president’s action is the first step needed to spark meaningful reform of the United Nations organization,” Gordon Chang writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c33135258&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f1332161d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fae45b65da&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e92e02f8f4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
We have huge news. Today, Mondaire announced the endorsement of 40 local elected officials and community leaders! | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.30z/jroJvhCSQEWW4ZFZOpNJyQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKKCL6yg4hlCURPhluny7bs-2B2iy1OYcplfLKClLk9NV0QEhH6nTiNTpf4KJuKhdkiDywpUQDZDOUEJV2QKkUwvhLgJiuZBs1PVTrikKDE67ukqt8IzJFaWpVrxk6toFda4uCCmggjj6e0AN69HihC2IQHKq8DLCCuHiJBURfEiIDScT1qfDgOBy2gCB1V0KdWxBWTerBMdFQ6aqH8GgpmpldiRHu-2FScsOvc2m0vaVJxeQ-3D-3D/zpZa) Friend, We have huge news. Today, Mondaire announced the endorsement of 40 local elected officials and community leaders! **_[Check out this article to see the full list.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.30z/jroJvhCSQEWW4ZFZOpNJyQ/h1/1gnTGGU97MjhNlRKS6a0oJHpTRf8HVPTb2mjljuDYOjBN8COGqSvfMLuNDVvYHB0L1Bug-2BI7HFi5K2Lzm1RCpL3AV8HKGytyyYf9rAWVbTTdggs-2FEZdgyeHd0snP-2BGPNQlklLVju-2F55qNGZrBgGvTSMPEElD5rLiF7p3F6c8e-2FOZpmlJS2LZ9x-2FOUeeHWZqNXNhN5IRMjQd8-2FDONOkkBAuSyN7Hs8q9SnjvEacigqTGZq6REhA8xKOZjLipfbVVZjlEP-2B8RLhTHhCHUDPA4hHFtN5jVJLrFDfkaoxkCAoqJaGRWU52ryJ2aQBzfG1RoM4I2aeAguRslizxgyIzpINA-3D-3D/te2y)_** They are mayors, city councilmembers, town councilmembers, village trustees, local activists, non-profit executives, faith leaders, and more, and they all know Mondaire has the integrity, experience, and vision needed to represent New York’s 17th Congressional District.
This campaign has so much momentum. We’ve been endorsed by national progressive leaders and organizations like Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Ayanna Pressley, and the Working Families Party. We’ve raised more in individual contributions than almost anyone in our race, without accepting a penny in corporate PAC money or self-funding millions of dollars. We’ve built a volunteer team of hundreds of people who are making thousands of calls and sending thousands of text messages on behalf of the campaign. And now, dozens of the most respected leaders in our community have stepped up to join our movement. **_[Will you join them in their support by making a donation today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.30z/jroJvhCSQEWW4ZFZOpNJyQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKKCL6yg4hlCURPhluny7bs-2B2iy1OYcplfLKClLk9NV0WOroRRlnU0zEJLVJ7N-2BIdeG3LK4TtqJXH0RUVnJ9RKCnAm1LlDh4uB64FIWhqR6-2FYXz5FFhKShVu8euwGSDVJj2fmmF6SKFxUrjZiPKVXuOH8OtQMYQEXz6dRW0LnARYV7Ut4IKBAL19oJ8jC-2BvxeXGn9mGWDS-2FuTHjObbowNATy60QqRjZ8CJ6VbCwJidFtw-3D-3D/llJb)_**
[Join our movement >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.30z/jroJvhCSQEWW4ZFZOpNJyQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKKCL6yg4hlCURPhluny7bs-2B2iy1OYcplfLKClLk9NV0a0dfk8kLELrd-2Fzb1pEN75tD1cR9WElo013P5kEsnhSWktvvVFJ4OyMFr5LiPqEYsBsOhxRDLdOhWc-2FoPJUh989bucPoqbE7JhGO5vP68Dhij-2BYKvgfqJS3UrDbZAJ0O-2FxRD19bm8M0UfgR0jfxtpGnfyuL0btSPoHiliUtO262ILoSxbfbFStaZc7ioEv2Ykg-3D-3D/eZUc)
We feel great about where we are, but we can’t slow down now. These final 10 weeks are the most crucial in the campaign. This is when most voters will be tuning into the election. The support of so many local elected officials and community leaders is crucial, but we still need to raise the resources to let voters know of the broad base of support Mondaire has in the district. **_[Can you make a contribution to help get that message out?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.30z/jroJvhCSQEWW4ZFZOpNJyQ/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKKCL6yg4hlCURPhluny7bs-2B2iy1OYcplfLKClLk9NV0SZnwUiQpb6ZkgdZdf-2B1B32ILc74V13ov004VxbZIDgl4F9zAn5BgwLnXWirC2kEsjj98TyY67SPgHLuGgWgfXozW896OPPli5S8TsP9LRdXPH88-2BXnIlSxogexWFmiewc-2BhsK9RENeYMV-2F6joOXF87KV-2FYO68tVsS-2B9qNKFOxSVcwxXfAHk3fGRH1IvsuDC9w-3D-3D/asg7)_**
Mondaire was born and raised in New York’s 17th Congressional District, and he didn’t just move back here. He’s spent his entire life fighting for working families. Now he’s looking to bring that fight to Washington. clean_body: We have huge news. Today, Mondaire announced the endorsement of 40 local elected officials and community leaders! | | | Friend, We have huge news. Today, Mondaire announced the endorsement of 40 local elected officials and community leaders! They are mayors, city councilmembers, town councilmembers, village trustees, local activists, non-profit executives, faith leaders, and more, and they all know Mondaire has the integrity, experience, and vision needed to represent New York’s 17th Congressional District. This campaign has so much momentum. We’ve been endorsed by national progressive leaders and organizations like Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Ayanna Pressley, and the Working Families Party. We’ve raised more in individual contributions than almost anyone in our race, without accepting a penny in corporate PAC money or self-funding millions of dollars. We’ve built a volunteer team of hundreds of people who are making thousands of calls and sending thousands of text messages on behalf of the campaign. And now, dozens of the most respected leaders in our community have stepped up to join our movement. We feel great about where we are, but we can’t slow down now. These final 10 weeks are the most crucial in the campaign. This is when most voters will be tuning into the election. The support of so many local elected officials and community leaders is crucial, but we still need to raise the resources to let voters know of the broad base of support Mondaire has in the district. Mondaire was born and raised in New York’s 17th Congressional District, and he didn’t just move back here. He’s spent his entire life fighting for working families. Now he’s looking to bring that fight to Washington. We’ve got 10 weeks to go. Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. name: Joe Biden
subject: I'd be honored if you joined my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I'm Joe Biden, and I'd like to earn your vote. You may have seen yesterday that Senator Warren endorsed our campaign. It's an endorsement that I am grateful for -- and one I don't take lightly. Her... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96f4e/3571012843/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Hey there. I'm Joe Biden, and I'd like to earn your vote.

You may have seen yesterday that Senator Warren endorsed our campaign. It's an endorsement that I am grateful for -- and one I don't take lightly. Her courage, tenacity, and persistence shed a light on some of the most important issues facing our country -- and has made a real difference in people's lives. The plans -- and the people who organized for them -- changed this race, the conversation, our party, and the country.

You know, primaries can often put a magnifying glass on small differences and bury broad consensus. Elizabeth and I believe at our cores Wall Street didn't build this country, the middle class did. And it's time our government worked harder for the middle class, but to do that we can demand nothing less than _"big, structural change."_

I know a lot of you feel that way. Some of you have been with Elizabeth since the beginning of her campaign. Together, you built one of the most impressive grassroots movements in the history of politics -- $5 and $10 at a time. You took on corruption. You fought big fights. And you pushed for big ideas.

I know, for some of you, that you might be skeptical of me or my campaign. I understand that. But I intend to earn your votes. And I intend to earn your trust.

I'm here to tell you that you're not only welcome as part of this campaign: you're needed.

The only way that we'll defeat Donald Trump is with a broad coalition of folks working together to win what I have been calling a battle for the soul of our nation.

**I'm not here to ask you for money -- I believe I need to earn it. So I'm asking if you will look me over, give me a chance, and join my campaign.** | [**I'M IN FOR JOE'S CAMPAIGN ➞**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb1/3571012843/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/join-team-joe-ew?source=JB_IMPORT_SWAP_2020.04.16_X_WARREN_X__X__EW-list")
---
When I say "winning a battle for the soul of our nation" people often misunderstand me. I'm not being nostalgic. I'm not trying to take us back to a country that never existed. The foundational principles of our country -- that all men are created equal -- are ones that we've never lived up to. But we've never given up trying to live up to them.

America wasn't built by Wall Street. It was forged by working people -- strivers, looking for their chance to get ahead. People like you, doing the work to make our country a better place.

It is not enough to "go back" to anything. We have to take immediate, bold action to tackle the climate crisis (and if you don't know, I wrote one of the first bills on climate change). We have to relieve a generation of the crushing burden of student debt. We have to make health care a right and not a privilege. And to get there, we're going to need millions of grassroots supporters to take action right away.

If you join our campaign, we will not just defeat Donald Trump. We will not just win the battle for the soul of our nation. We will transform it too.

To close, I will humbly ask:

**Will you join my campaign today? I'd be honored if you did:**
[**I'M IN FOR JOE'S CAMPAIGN ➞**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb1/3571012843/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/join-team-joe-ew?source=JB_IMPORT_SWAP_2020.04.16_X_WARREN_X__X__EW-list")
---
Thank you for everything,

Joe Biden

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb0/3571012843/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb3/3571012843/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb2/3571012843/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb5/3571012843/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb4/3571012843/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cd/45c30650/1f5ea019e/66e96fb7/3571012843/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---
