name: Alex Meyer, Campaign Manager
subject: Grassroots update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I wanted to take a quick break from the campaign trail to give you an update on what Team Scheller has been doing during these unprecedented times. Am Peter, I wanted to take a quick break from the campaign trail to give you an update on what Team Scheller has been doing during these unprecedented times. America’s battle with the coronavirus pandemic is a milestone moment in the history of this country. It’s also uncharted territory for political campaigns.
Team Scheller is taking action in PA-07 while President Trump and his administration continue to guide the country through this crisis. We have closed our campaign office in Northampton County and our campaign team has been working remotely to help slow the spread. Fully embracing these new limitations in a critical election year, we have rolled out a slate of new campaign tools and initiatives to carry the campaign through this unexpected moment in American history. This may not be the campaign we originally planned but we are confident that we will get through this and come out stronger on the other side.
Our campaign had set an internal goal of contacting thousands of voters at their doorstep to spread the message that Lisa Scheller is the only true conservative candidate in this race, with a track record of lowering taxes and fighting for the issues that matter to her community. Instead of cancelling these plans, we decided to switch to a virtual campaign. With this switch we have been able to hold two virtual grassroots trainings a week, we have trained dozens of new volunteers, and made over FIFTY THOUSAND volunteer phone calls to the voters of Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District.
We would love to have you join our next grassroots training. [ **SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER HERE** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=36720fe2cc7a453f93643bcc8299fadc&_e=EFost6G870I9O8QOjeLtm9ugmSF3ucsja86oSaPwYl4v4SP5nIK2KG6r11QuYCW-mXN2fVCGo2bNmyrT1K2-p4fDr3vVwPOcbeLY97eC4dHrY5_1oLeszQ8Kf0zlgVsG2lW7mo4Tz8CznfOYdkYQOzv5KbQasQcT5wWuXpixodEsmy27nGWxJlsyhCc0tubxgzckkyGQK3hxI1CyEPdO22uRiND_sGTuhz1yRY6yCe1mOc_sspTU4dWP1CbDEvo6cJQzm4MlyPjyOXEdZIw6hmYzekqoyC93bQgpN9pf_eprfDHZZuC4SUiMbmc0l9UjKsfNwO3zqOgFpSDVph26CbLYvQZPZ2p6W_WQsrWHIjXtg-qQ5wMft7uGKLriopg7jno7w9Cz5cuBs1maFwaHVeqxJk31j7ZZfhv2M_cT1tWtNgyytXEGmNCv-6o3dDkx) We’re not slowing down, either. Lisa is posting campaign updates to her facebook page weekly and we are holding Tele-Town Halls regularly to answer questions and reach out to the voters. If you would have told me in November that come springtime we would not be having meet and greets in every corner of the district and campaign rallies at our Northampton County office every night, I would not have believed you. However, we are doing all we can to make the best of our quarantine situation.
While Nancy Pelosi and her pal Susan Wild have been playing partisan games in Washington, Lisa has been busy in Lehigh Valley. Earlier this month, Lisa donated 8,000 face masks to St. Luke’s and Lehigh Valley Health Network hospitals. Lisa and her neighbors held a food and supply drive to benefit Everlasting Life Ministries and Lisa donated 800 flowers, from a local flower shop, to the Lehigh Valley hospitals to spread a little joy to the doctors and nurses on the frontlines. Lisa’s dedication to helping the community did not stop when this pandemic started and she vows to continue doing all she can to help our community fight through these unprecedented times.
This is the type of leadership we need so desperately in Washington D.C., right now. We need your help to get the word out about Lisa’s winning message. I hope you can join me at one of our virtual meetings.
If you can’t join us on our training, would you please consider giving $5, $10, $15 to help us cover the costs of switching to virtual campaigns.

**[$5](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=36720fe2cc7a453f93643bcc8299fadc&_e=EFost6G870I9O8QOjeLtm5QAt5iQqZKO0MPLbHNAGOQgkLLSdhNBcI306wED2BoYDYnM0A6IZ-7OYIo9_eytif9bzYKIs2V64XJCAsBwwJSJX8tnh-dbZT_uGH8wKF8p2Ncdek9YwSSBL8sYZdeP4jum1EUPaFXe58M33GlSj9JbekCOJzwtQhAOiMzVtsPuTUy4i4VwjeIUBDEB9ixUbvVF0kw1yYCamfz3PqD4Us2YS7zhKB6UBeibgPeg9AtuSkMR-tsN9VbYBiIsdVDn0lLYADM3F9XfBkxVdguwrMDTb0x33-WlV46lx3HmceTB3XvGowB0QsIvFHcNfDvDIht4p_fgNc2pDpSnN5Wziw93vJ3ZegZ56AgYeAykQZA0bnsHq8TNrSShD3eZW9uaJP7pC7jk-b-uOVo6aNtaubdGcknBjN7XLAQ69WxjvZXXYL4_YUXQIFWR09wvKUTvZ5H0r7b18ski3dlpt1zxbag%3D)** **[$10](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=36720fe2cc7a453f93643bcc8299fadc&_e=EFost6G870I9O8QOjeLtm5QAt5iQqZKO0MPLbHNAGOQgkLLSdhNBcI306wED2BoYDYnM0A6IZ-7OYIo9_eytiTZyUTPWVYPzyHtrVEDa-ELm3tV5jCdKsqeNW12F_wyXzTlQCvmX84rLp5-O4V4qp8Ny5tZ0_oL86MLLe17vn6w5V69cDzzyXYJQD4XOQ09OGsBdKerwT2ciEHADIisY9SZ5XN6O3N-m21yM1kLlKGqWsCfrxwC55CEEhrjhAArhzmETtO2NApq2f_aXv_ni3TwLBw_BtUg17gp0oWcl3sD8Hu7huQs8o1bpdxwxT2ma0H6RMK4xhROhDuDuU0DHoQoXmg3JGHguMB7E7K13rbPzjWH7ObIKpXGuYHcpXV9aNhowowKe8ocdE6qfmFI4DmipHBD_KCVLmNkW9w0McMisiy0jawR5xMTxttQ6YBPIdWLWKiBiGwfoCwbqj-vSEWJiroks1vxVuhdUu0Ql5tU%3D)** **[$15](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=36720fe2cc7a453f93643bcc8299fadc&_e=EFost6G870I9O8QOjeLtm5QAt5iQqZKO0MPLbHNAGOQgkLLSdhNBcI306wED2BoYDYnM0A6IZ-7OYIo9_eytiUIyFgE-GdyDcYHhOSAeDC9qpA4kGCxW-13ADHY7_JzT0Cs6rxsm4TMBUdBeu2wclQPDCi4_Y4mnqUV9QVn3PlMZ1wGM7to9KjEkTvRf7ooarhSEGP4qKe6X30xr1uCFdv2SMg7oRLdCFPA2QRDZ-7KLyUsGSRRQuPFPu1KECCH7QnYLUPQ68hXzVxpGOrzpZ7NFlUabzAuN-yORucfc-gDLaPyQCwJJt6yLDGH_oQX6HDWJ5xdDFikl05-OgFrwsYiEv1rgS3VqCsdF3KnMduhz5-UzMKRcqRGzCB2-u14rT5tSqo_oU6M9_lEfsqnHpcNJBd3vyFsvRm9DNt6DEOTceiRK7dGlIZDXRGKxZUK8LsKqoMvdIMQc4eNdVgbZnrIc3ihYquH0vy4LHVkdliw%3D)**
Stay Safe, Alex Meyer Campaign Manager Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=36720fe2cc7a453f93643bcc8299fadc&_t=1XhNjB5mj9d4nSOkVmMawBxI7EzGF79inKorrqZFCBm4ttILBJKCYd7ZKIXoxiCTLX-4DLBaWGFVoz-kBLgwmD9wH0gj_NeE9dwxnhiAqfyNTtQbrss_8lkzdgxq97iHZJPTVBw11RJREftzxwziV4wY4RskYeLW2-BLwGTBlm8%3D)

Lisa and her neighbors held a food and supply drive to benefit Everlasting Life Ministries and Lisa donated 800 flowers, from a local flower shop, to the Lehigh Valley hospitals to spread a little joy to the doctors and nurses on the frontlines. Lisa’s dedication to helping the community did not stop when this pandemic started and she vows to continue doing all she can to help our community fight through these unprecedented times. This is the type of leadership we need so desperately in Washington D.C., right now. We need your help to get the word out about Lisa’s winning message. I hope you can join me at one of our virtual meetings. If you can’t join us on our training, would you please consider giving $5, $10, $15 to help us cover the costs of switching to virtual campaigns. Stay Safe, Alex Meyer Campaign Manager Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Here's how we're going to do it:
1. **Run sophisticated, targeted Internet ads to turn out voters in critical states that Democrats lost in 2016.** This includes swing states like Michigan, Wisconsin, Florida, Pennsylvania, and others. Sadly, the Electoral College matters most in the presidential race. In most states, it's winner-take-all -- that means even if Trump only wins a state by 0.01%, he'll win ALL of the Electoral College votes from that state. The 2016 election outcome came down as far as the county level in some of these states. We will identify and message to key voters, and show them the AWFUL job that Trump has done, and every way that he has failed working families as president. We'll highlight Democrats' plan to permanently protect Social Security and Medicare, make health care accessible and affordable, and put an end to corruption in government. We cannot let Trump win these states again.

2. **Inspire and UNITE Democrats around our nominee.** The truth is that Joe Biden will be a better president than Trump. Bernie Sanders would have been a better president than Trump. _Any 2020 Democratic candidate would have been a better president than Trump._ We intend to help unify our party around our nominee -- because beating Trump is the most important thing we can do for our future, no matter who you supported in the Democratic primary. We need EVERY Democrat to vote for our nominee.

Moving forward, we will keep you fully up to date on our strategy, and ask you for feedback, Peter. This is a grassroots Democratic organization, and you're the key to our success.

**Maine:**
Sara Gideon vs. Susan Collins [+1]

Amy McGrath vs Mitch McConnell **[TOSS-UP]**

**South Carolina:**
Jaime Harrison vs. Lindsey Graham **[TOSS-UP]**

---

We can elect Democratic candidates like Mark Kelly, John Hickenlooper, and Barbara Bollier -- **but we can 't let up now. _Republicans are counting on your apathy._**

**Don 't forget:** McConnell's Senate Leadership Fund PAC is running $67 million in TV ads this fall and the National Republican Senatorial Committee raised $70 million last year.

[Click here and rush a donation of $10 or more so that we can flip these Senate seats and take the majority back from the GOP and Mitch McConnell.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c6c/4bd7760e/5a3811eb/77af5ea7/2889323084/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+and+rush+a+donation+of+ask+or&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200416_1MC_1MO_none_STD_1_senatebattleground&source=314_EM_FR_200416_1MC_1MO_none_STD_1_senatebattleground&refcode=314_EM_FR_200416_1MC_1MO_none_STD_1_senatebattleground")

body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c73/4bd7760e/5a3a1bce/77af5ece/1171935199/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&source=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c73/4bd7760e/5a3a1bce/77af5ecd/1171935199/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1YTNhMWJjZSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0YzczIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5a3a1bce/29bb4c73?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&source=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja") to unsubscribe.
| | November brings the most consequential election of our lifetime -- it's critical that everyone has the ability to vote.

That is why vote by mail must be available to ALL voters.

[If you agree, then sign on and demand that all state governments make voluntary vote by mail accessible for everyone:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c73/4bd7760e/5a3a1bce/77af5ecc/1171935199/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-your-state-election-officials-vote-by-mail-must-be-available-to-all-voters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-votebymailja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200414_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+If+you+agree+then+sign+on+and+demand+tha&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")

| [DEMAND VOTE BY MAIL](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c73/4bd7760e/5a3a1bce/77af5ecb/1171935199/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-your-state-election-officials-vote-by-mail-must-be-available-to-all-voters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-votebymailja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200414_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+DEMAND+VOTE+BY+MAIL&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_3MO_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")
---

Listen, under normal circumstances, it is difficult for Americans to get to the ballot box on election day. Long lines, limited polling place hours, inconvenient polling locations, not getting time off work, and voter suppression all make voting a hurdle for many Americans.

Now we are dealing with a global pandemic, and voting in-person may put American's health in danger.

**It 's obvious:** Americans should not have to choose between the first amendment and their own safety.

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Following up on our end of quarter goal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Yesterday was the first FEC reporting deadline of the year, friends .
You can tell a lot about a campaign from its supporters. In our case, that’s you: hardworking folks who have chipped in what you can, because you believe in our movement.
But Andy Barr’s report yesterday showed something else entirely: the power of the Mitch McConnell corporate cash machine. Even with our economy shut down, Barr continued to rake in corporate cash. Nearly 60% of his fundraising came from PACs, not people — and he brought in over $40,000 from Corporate PACs alone.
Our campaign doesn’t take corporate donations. We don’t have a PAC. We’re not going to take checks from special interests. We’re raising money $5, $50, and $100 at a time. And it’s working.
We had our strongest fundraising quarter of this campaign, and we did it all while staying true to our values.
Our hard work and your dedication is getting noticed. Just a few weeks ago, we earned the endorsement of VoteVets, the largest advocacy group of veterans working to elect Democrats across the country.
So thank you for being on our team, and thank you for helping us grow this campaign from an idea into a movement
Thank you from everyone here,
Josh (for Brett, Nate, Nicole, Lee, and Hadley)
Donate [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_btn]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr1 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr1]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr2]
CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr3]

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: This has to be some kind of mistake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Dear Friend,

I just got the final numbers from our mid-month deadline, and I'm sorry to say that we failed to reach this critical fundraising goal.

I'll be honest with you, Friend. Last quarter we were outraised by my radical opponent, and meeting this deadline was vital to the success of our campaign moving forward.

Every missed goal puts Chuck Schumer and the DSCC one step closer to hijacking Kentucky's Senate seat and turning the Senate blue. == If you don't chip in now, we won't have the funds necessary to go toe to toe with Chuck Schumer and his left-wing fundraising machine this fall. == Thank you for your help, Mitch McConnell Text MITCH to 47360 to receive mobile alerts! Team Mitch is happy to help at 1 800-403-1744. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Terms and Conditions ==. body:
We said we were going to send our most dedicated supporters early access to our TV ad. Well, here it is, thank you for a donation to ensure it gets plenty of air time:
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello everyone. We said we were going to send our most dedicated supporters early access to our TV ad. Well, here it is, and thank you for a [_**donation to ensure it gets plenty of air time:**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a3/33365068/4a76856d/3f8bf5ef/3116673653/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200416_adpreview_em_fr_all_l1") [](secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200416_adpreview_em_fr_all_vid) This is the first TV ad presented by any candidate in the 47-day homestretch before the primary on June 2. Admiral Mike is committed to ensuring Iowans know that he provides the leadership and experience needed to rebuild and rejuvenate America after the pandemic. Yup, he is the real deal! Voters will get a clear picture of what Admiral Mike stands for, why he's the right person to assume the leadership role for Iowa in the Senate, and what he can do for this state and our nation. [_**Our Ad Fund is open, and we 're looking for resources to keep this ad online for the next seven weeks. name: Karl Rove
subject: ❗Important update
body:
Friend, Please forgive me for getting right to the point. I want to get this email to you as quickly as possible since I'm very excited about this idea and Sen. Cornyn asked me to email you about it as soon as I could. Given the social distancing and quarantines necessitated by COVID-19, Sen. Cornyn has been unable to attend events with his closest supporters. He's worried that if this continues for much longer, he'll lose out on valuable feedback and advice from Texans who know how to keep our state RED. Do you remember a few months ago when you were introduced to the concept of the "Team Cornyn: Leadership Team?" This is a select group of Senator Cornyn's most motivated supporters, whom he could rely on for advice and counsel. This group could be one of the most valuable strengths of the entire campaign. **[Sen. Cornyn has decided that, given present circumstances, a SPECIAL RE-OPENING OF THE LEADERSHIP TEAM is in order, and you, Friend, have been specially nominated to join.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013hg0JZP_zkjt2euGO2TRI4aAIIzz51OTzrSSZkz_CUpqOV6tnp6wUyTx6LucYh26P3m7sV4xmytD0bjJAmD9W7A5vfAhWgsmucqBX-omOaN6eix9pmPjHvuWJhu4Fga0ZNW4Zj145g7-H_gu0cAtyaNe7S7qPIQ_HraS7IPzn-7Ji1b1RH4kdTREGuYliWQVogBoffX78Km09CLa8xWjG77GKX4g91dHIvfoylXFD_Tb5TIH1DZKqkCVh5VLBtb3_nTrMxnrmnT_ipRBdIo_OLk4MnKQW7VSEgZjUQE6FyrWNx6YLg77KMzc4vXOdX73YAvMx5F4s8lGHlYBwAiuWG94t2S1U8DkxrtkDPZfaCN6tcQ4oZQkDA==&c=xhAyyQEnpgW_Kw7E0776yjxI6SrUvlU0-20TJSJJQqd_bY4jcqOfQQ==&ch=F0na35nqzITVzu05cDBd1RGvoJ8oONnbUjSSnLWx6mNCWLU-IfhwUg==)** **SPECIAL LEADERSHIP TEAM RE-OPENING** Nomination Code: Pending... clean_body: Friend, Please forgive me for getting right to the point. I want to get this email to you as quickly as possible since I'm very excited about this idea and Sen. Cornyn asked me to email you about it as soon as I could. Given the social distancing and quarantines necessitated by COVID-19, Sen. Cornyn has been unable to attend events with his closest supporters. He's worried that if this continues for much longer, he'll lose out on valuable feedback and advice from Texans who know how to keep our state RED. Do you remember a few months ago when you were introduced to the concept of the "Team Cornyn: Leadership Team?" This is a select group of Senator Cornyn's most motivated supporters, whom he could rely on for advice and counsel. This group could be one of the most valuable strengths of the entire campaign. == SPECIAL LEADERSHIP TEAM RE-OPENING Nomination Code: Pending... == == Texas Republicans will continue coming under attack in coming weeks, no matter what, and Sen. name: PragerU
subject: Some troubling calls
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==) Fellow American,
We hope that you and your families are safe and well.
At PragerU, we're working harder than ever (from home!) to undo the damage done to our nation by producing and distributing short, digestible, educational videos that bring the conservative message to younger generations.
**PragerU has America 's single largest megaphone directly into millennials and "Gen Z," and during this difficult time, we are working to be a part of the solution by educating viewers about founding principles, timeless truths, and American exceptionalism.**
These principles have sustained us through hard times, and have made us stronger as a nation. They will do so again.
But, to be completely honest with you, we've been getting troubling calls from some of our most generous supporters. _Because of the recent downturn brought on by the coronavirus crisis, many of our longtime supporters are saying they will not be able to help with a significant gift this year._
**[We fear that the important work we have accomplished educating younger generations about conservative principles might be in jeopardy, which is why we're asking for your immediate gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==)** [**Give Now**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==) **PragerU videos have been viewed more than 3.3 BILLION times. And survey after survey proves that we 're changing hearts and minds with our educational content.**
Which might be why the better-funded left are using this opportunity to diminish our voice.
They are working right now -- in the midst of this national crisis -- to find the money to bury our ideas simply by making and marketing more left-wing content than we can produce.
But as everyone finds themselves physically trapped in their homes, it presents a golden opportunity to educate Americans who are spending more time online than ever before.
**[Can we count on your support today to help us continue our important work?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==)**
**The question is: Which side will harness this opportunity to influence hundreds of millions of young people?**
We need to be sure it's us at PragerU-- not the side taking advantage of this crisis as a chance to grab ever more government control.
You can help PragerU in many different ways as we weather this storm: **1. [Give a generous gift if you are able to do so. Help us make up the gap for those who can no longer afford to give this year.

](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==)2. ** _Ask your friends to match your gift_ or at least share our content with them!

_3\. Keep PragerU in your thoughts and prayers_. Please continue to pray for our success every week. Your encouragement will help our staff stay strong during these trying times.
This shutdown is testing us, but together we can -- and will -- succeed.
We know that, as a fellow conservative, you're alongside us in the fight for liberty, whether you can give financially or not.
**[But if you are able, I hope and pray that we can count on your generous gift today to help us continue our important work.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==)** [**Give Now**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nvZWx67xYEBWTv9xDd7ECIVYoUAJ8GpLGOa8QFuSOGWpTEjOdrr_aNu9XQnKDuMeCPySQ2iNJNsW3_hjJkpvNMvGeVTR0DDAVJ08yWe1mL58Cqe5ffS08Ulsld0YJK-5fo6SexRaqG4GJ_U6r3KSqSzS3Bpr_r7GZWvGKJJwy_CNuQvBbK7bTf-J1Um1ftI9wLoSsWkzme0SuT0TuKssshGz7Asq4iix24j4ZPbMKNNxwMZ1PHKoegYqObSOSl1WEqoDHULNPY=&c=aDwBkcNkXLCzIUhQuCrATHZEvBuUHzjUBvJZ1LfHvjTfVKE-s7ZKyw==&ch=kcWeNBtc9lyUVZ1zijXQ1FmDFeNrQo4CVPigcBwpalILl1g4eZIBSQ==) Thank you in advance for anything you can do, and God bless you and your family.
With gratitude,
Marissa Streit CEO, PragerU

body:
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS: Postmaster General says U.S. Postal Service will COLLAPSE without Emergency Funding** [**RAPID RESPONSE PETITION: Sign your name to SAVE the United States Postal Service ->**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef16/647407243/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200416_Post_U1_X2??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+RAPID+RESPONSE+PETITION+Sign+your+name+t&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
* * *
| **_WE. ARE. OUTRAGED._** | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef19/647407243/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200416_Post_U1_X2??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
---
_The U.S. Postal Service needs $75 Billion in emergency funding or they 'll be forced to SHUT DOWN!_
But Trump just flat out REFUSED to help the Postal Service -- saying he would not sign a coronavirus aid package that sent any relief to USPS.
**We need all-hands-on-deck to fight back against this VICIOUS assault and SAVE the Post Office:**
| | [EMERGENCY PETITION: Save the Post Office ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef18/647407243/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200416_Post_U1_X2??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+EMERGENCY+PETITION+Save+the+Post+Office+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
---

**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED**
_**Peter -- our hearts are PLUMMETING:**_
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef1b/647407243/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200416_Post_U1_X2??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
---
Millions of Americans rely on the U.S. Postal Service for affordable, reliable mail delivery. The Postal Service is actually _required by law_ to deliver to every mailing address in the country, 6 days a week, rain or shine.
But Trump wants to RUIN the Postal Service and force them into BANKRUPTCY!
| [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef1a/647407243/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200416_Post_U1_X2??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
---
"Some lawmakers, postal union representatives and others who rely on the service now fear that **the Trump administration is trying to use the current crisis** to achieve conservatives' longstanding goal of nudging the mail service toward privatization...**by essentially forcing it into bankruptcy.** "
**Universal Vote By Mail, the Census...even online shopping...it ALL depends on the United States Postal Service.**
We need to show Trump the American people WILL NOT stand for this attack. So we need 10,000 Democrats to sign on and show their support:
| | [SIGN THE PETITION: Save the Postal Service ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef1d/647407243/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_200416_Post_U1_X2??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION+Save+the+Postal+Servic&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
---
Thanks for speaking out, Peter. We couldn't do this without you!
_\--Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef1c/647407243/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef1f/647407243/VEsO/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef1e/647407243/VEsP/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f8/72412298/4e138024/6104ef01/647407243/VEsHBQ/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_PostOffice_U1_X2")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amy=20Ryan=20Courser?=
subject: Let's put a Conservative Oregonian back in Congress!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AMY RYAN COURSER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Will you help Republican Amy Ryan Courser reclaim Congressional District 5 from the liberal left?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon/lets-put-a-conservative-oregonian-back-in-congress?e=36bbc8e2ca)
https://amyfororegon.com?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281

** Hi Peter, my name is Amy Ryan Courser, the former elected Keizer City Councilwomen and independent businesswoman running against Kurt Schrader for Oregon's 5th Congressional District.
------------------------------------------------------------
Our campaign has energy and momentum right now, but I need your help to reclaim our conservative seat in Congress.

For the past 12 years, Kurt Schrader has been playing a political game of hide & seek. He hides away in Washington DC while DOING NOTHING for Oregon, then reappears every couple of years just to seek re-election before disappearing again.

** But in 2020, our votes will make Kurt disappear from Congress for good!
------------------------------------------------------------

While you’ve probably heard this every couple of years, make no mistake that the 2020 election cycle is the most important in our lifetime. Not only is maintaining control of the White House on the ballot, but so is winning back the majority in Congress.

With me as the Republican candidate, the CD5 Congressional seat is WINNABLE, now more than ever! We MUST beat the well-funded Dems at the ballot box in November. Kurt Schrader already has more than $3,000,000 in the bank, so I need your help to catch up.

** I’m asking that you donate any amount you’re comfortable making so that Oregonians like us can take back our district from the left and save our State before it’s too late.
------------------------------------------------------------
https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281

https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281

https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281

https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281

** NOW IS THE TIME TO KEEP AMERICA GREAT!
------------------------------------------------------------

And the timing is critical, so I need your reply ASAP. I cannot do this alone, so your donation of any amount (https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281) is greatly appreciated! You can learn more about me and my platform by visiting my Official Website (https://amyfororegon.com?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281) or on my Facebook (https://facebook.com/amyfororegon?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a620001895-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-a620001895-221104281) page.

Respectfully,

** Amy Ryan Courser
------------------------------------------------------------

503-343-4740
5434 River Rd. N #219
Keizer, Oregon 97303
amy@amyfororegon.com (mailto:amy@amyfororegon.com)

============================================================

Huge news, team:

**We just finished tallying up our fundraising numbers from the first three months of 2020. We’re happy to announce that we raised $460,000 -- our best quarterly fundraising effort to date!**

The best part is that it's all thanks to you! Here are some highlights: **✓ 11,120 -** Total number of individual donors who gave to our campaign.
**✓ $12.26 -** Our average online contribution from emails like this one.
**✓ $0 -** Amount of cash raised from corporate PACs. We're also proud that 95% of our contributions came from individual donors chipping in less than $200. That’s huge. And it's a testament to the broad and unified grassroots coalition that Georgette is building.

**We’re so grateful for your support, but the hard truth is we were still out-raised by our opponent Sara Jacobs.** As you may know, she is self-funding a significant portion of her campaign (82%). Her billionaire grandparents also spent **$1.5 million** on her behalf through a super PAC in the primary election. We expect even more will come in the general.

**[If we're going to overcome our opponent’s millions, we'll need to keep the momentum up. name: Terry Neese
subject: We need to fire Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, It is no secret Oklahomans, Americans, and our businesses are suffering right now. **But Nancy Pelosi still doesn 't seem to get it.** While President Trump and Republicans have worked to get aid to the American people and our small businesses, Pelosi has used this crisis to play political games. **After holding up the initial coronavirus relief package over unrelated funding like $75 MILLION for the National Foundation on the Arts and the Humanities and $25 MILLION for a performing arts center in D.C., Pelosi is now holding up funds designed to help small businesses keep workers on payroll.** _That is just wrong. And it 's why we have to FIRE Nancy Pelosi this November._ **But the only way to do it is to get rid of her Democrat enablers like Kendra Horn.** Our campaign is ready to do just that, but we need your help. Friend, I know these are difficult times. But if your situation allows, [please consider donating $5, $10, or $25 to our campaign today.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/axzur6bGLtsL9fMaV7635oQA/5P7763ig8929ZlY5N24hqUrHeQ)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

#
Hello, I never imagined sending another email like this, but our country is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. Our schools, our places of worship, and many businesses are closed as we do our civic duty to slow the outbreak of the coronavirus. So, I need to be honest with you: just as this pandemic has surely impacted you and your family, it has impacted our campaign, too. We’ve canceled our in-person fundraisers. Our average online contribution has unsurprisingly dropped in the last month. My whole team is working remotely and we’re overhauling our paid media and organizing plan — just as Mitch McConnell’s super PAC and Republican groups are booking millions of dollars in ads to help our opponent. This crisis requires a different kind of campaign to flip Colorado’s Senate seat blue — one that none of us could have imagined just a few short months ago. That means messages like this are more important to winning this election than ever before. We can’t win this election without a lot of folks stepping up for our team in the coming weeks, which is why I’m personally asking: **Please, can I count on you to donate $10 or more right now? name: Jake C.
subject: Become a virtual volunteer today!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/BTQ_MMWz03jJZwujgCLPTnespgwysnQaD69QEU2GJcs=)

Peter,

From all of us on Team Bunkeddeko, I want to thank everyone who's stepped up to support our campaign in these ever-changing times. Whether that's reaching out to members of our community by phone or text or joining in during our virtual town halls, we couldn't be more proud to have you standing with us (from six feet away, of course). **[If you haven't yet had the chance to get involved, or if you'd like to become more involved in the movement we're building together, will you sign up to volunteer remotely today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/wzG0Nv3JLJFbK1UrXYpEJ03x7hf7G_9RVfBAT5beHkw=)**

******[BECOME A VIRTUAL VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/wzG0Nv3JLJFbK1UrXYpEJ03x7hf7G_9RVfBAT5beHkw=)******

As we take this campaign completely digital, we need to get creative in how we reach voters between now and June 23rd. That means making more phone calls, sending more texts, hosting more virtual meet-ups, and making the switch to digital organizing. That's where you come in: **[Will you become a volunteer and help us go digital?](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/wzG0Nv3JLJFbK1UrXYpEJ03x7hf7G_9RVfBAT5beHkw=)**

******[I 'M IN](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/wzG0Nv3JLJFbK1UrXYpEJ03x7hf7G_9RVfBAT5beHkw=)******

We deeply believe that now more than ever, we need thoughtful, energetic, and active representatives in government. **We need bold ways, not old ways.** We know you agree, and that's why we need your help. **[Will you join us as we fight to make a difference in our neighborhood's future?](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/wzG0Nv3JLJFbK1UrXYpEJ03x7hf7G_9RVfBAT5beHkw=)**

Best,
Jake C.

******[CLICK HERE TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgcRv2-mmcC--pqLs4leiexXpu3CMO7-6GTdim07_Mg=/wzG0Nv3JLJFbK1UrXYpEJ03x7hf7G_9RVfBAT5beHkw=)******

name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: Trump's decision to withhold WHO funding
body:
Support the global fight against the coronavirus.

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=22bcc0235d104bda8110ea46bdc2f527&_e=7A_2tsWpMe2dOpG9FcIGblqTuPt-CBpACUIxPKY3w2zvLlYx_y2IJaBpxkNtb1j7_RPr9xg0rrZyOcFZHeCqG4i5zq8HJ-PAgPSdvlItZ7ut9kFDcjSZLo5xGj4sxLX-xAYR51baVmX7j1xNR8Bt_SmYGF7t-_Hi_vPUulPL_bM7SGLYUFTHi9AfmIvwUVlm1Q8buTx_jXtbkQU5jnstbiEL3xW6tbVWVtihR3jdqxtBgecwIcEgE83MCupV6FSt4FhrkR-HH32NxOFdG73vidIciAKQj634_pZsp0XJuxUr0xsVi-x3CFu2xqcKF-iZ) Friend, Yesterday, Mike issued a statement about the president's decision to withhold U.S. funding support for the World Health Organization. This is such an important matter that we wanted to share it with you directly: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=22bcc0235d104bda8110ea46bdc2f527&_e=7A_2tsWpMe2dOpG9FcIGbpZ4aCSOm_bj_S6lvF7W6bkjZd7_yG8i9bR4pckD67bCspqxlvd2Fpd4t89-GX0JnZgOsX0qCKLbJwHDC9DF6bxl_y3bzE73N_vObOFeUrnlS9acnou8JjA6exZfnSeEBXTqSsgIW3ue-WEN85KJ2UIZSOTj8ohfzzULCs1-9G8krZgAQuydmAvGTrCRdnrfJCXVGVRCiEjm-xF2mUHdoCQO_0CY_ewbChSh8i8UQoKx-p4oQOkhEPaLUDAUci0ky08PUKGzAYAyiaskzRnmaHIgM6A7nixd_ErW4SgAWzYIxaEDhoHoX_bUit2lOdEY_VJcsxxPsvyWPhDUVTs4EGiNrlNZTixlYrMMpJHcs7qu) This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. That's why Bloomberg Philanthropies is supporting global efforts to prevent the spread and supporting local initiatives to help mayors, here and around the world, to respond. We're partnering to support development of therapies to treat the critically ill, and helping New York City social services, cultural nonprofits, and public hospitals fulfill their missions under extremely challenging circumstances. We are one of many groups taking action and finding solutions. To remove support from any initiative or organization fighting this pandemic -- especially the World Health Organization -- only weakens the efforts to save lives and lengthens the time until countries, cities, and communities can return to normal. If you can, we're encouraging you to show your support for the WHO today. You can use the links below to share messages on Facebook and Twitter: On Facebook: [**https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.facebook.com/mikebloomberg/posts/10160305841338499**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=22bcc0235d104bda8110ea46bdc2f527&_e=7A_2tsWpMe2dOpG9FcIGbpZ4aCSOm_bj_S6lvF7W6bkjZd7_yG8i9bR4pckD67bCspqxlvd2Fpd4t89-GX0JnZgOsX0qCKLbJwHDC9DF6bxl_y3bzE73N_vObOFeUrnlS9acnou8JjA6exZfnSeEBXTqSsgIW3ue-WEN85KJ2UIPtutY7IHFpHjBBZ3k6ViTxe8OM5XeUUm6B6nDIqyNYUfcVbHOB_2vOYKsgiFB3CGqsCd34O9rKXFBGhcW5hDUcKxMKxmFOSKP4P85BEvcIIZyvlWUIitmkiqt0zdTNIAOiK1eoNRfxzv2cz6rxbVYOqmbJDcrogyP_08yXtkCvMp1fq9yd5QbK_G1CqHVKuKfy-RC2TR7_s88EUHhnnlk) On Twitter: [**https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=https%3A//twitter.com/MikeBloomberg/status/1250435965761417223?s=20**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=22bcc0235d104bda8110ea46bdc2f527&_e=7A_2tsWpMe2dOpG9FcIGbpNF2TYdIcLI0dCxczjs5uZ97slXpy_COdmq2Hh_quJIoO_RfliJyZ12dyapIy26JZPFfqoqTCMZ9C-GIQjU_L9PSl8H6LN5Kr2WCusFCjOFJjLksiTndzjBxETB3rZBEX65RkDCwYRZ07ZGSRQwj0bWXUsOugVHzWnEpQucWogNAzkLvkptoR7ExAYc6f8mCkfME4-MN7bBmv7bAmDTh9V-6ZBqmiLcOZbQUpmKeAxjV3ZLsRp3htBwhMerxkmm9XQ1lsE3HjcLKuA7hKgiRZ9ocS0WXvr5IIAwcD2KT8xX4NcxcWEMNrVpYXUFNgRwvOG2cCQm_hFI-DixMT_RYgNMlZfBIp1d-BgX3K3K82-Mwop4Y-fzSJaei9gbQ-syLSJEhYUDwfkPPRBUskHMQcggr81T1jJNPbzH1xPNUrI7mSpCKxPbbwuFmtVYVG-_2-KkzVlteJKYNqm27fsvrOGshMEoWrq-kSv9Gvwm-CRDn4dVRurxE57ChX4WLdrebBOBxNnC8PSF8H8dCcJO3XmOilvgA5UkYcee1KX9zmElAalNy4O5A2_ph9ToNOfQLEYOZZ3Sha_c9TeHlSC1Vqw%3D) Thanks, Bloomberg Philanthropies

subject: BREAKING: Cornyn just raised another $2.7 million

body:
He now has nearly $13 million cash on hand.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9f/710658557/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Senator Cornyn just raised another $2.7 million. He's raising millions, buying ads, and hiring staff. Help MJ keep up!

[Chip in to help MJ fight back >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9e/710658557/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=10")** Hey Peter!

Senator John Cornyn has spent his career selling everyday people out to special interests, and his latest fundraising numbers are just what you'd expect. **He now has nearly $13 million cash on hand.**

If you're in a position to donate, please don't wait -- **[pitch in now toward our $25,000 goal and help us build the campaign we need to defeat Sen. Cornyn!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9e/710658557/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=10")**

Madison Goldstein
Deputy Finance Director \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Team MJ Hegar for Texas**
Subject: MJ believes in this team
>
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9e/710658557/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=10")
> ---
> Thanks to grassroots support from people like you, we're well on our way to hitting our Mid-Month Goal for April -- but we're not there yet! Unlike Sen. Cornyn, we aren't taking money from corporate PACs, so goals like this are only reachable because we have a massive team that believes in MJ.
>
> **[Make your first* donation toward our $25,000 mid-month goal today (if you can) to get your name added to our list of donors!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9e/710658557/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=10")**
>
> We know that _everyone_ on this team is passionate about electing MJ for so many reasons: from protecting their health care and reproductive rights to keeping our communities safe from gun violence. Together, we'll kick Sen. Cornyn out of Washington and send MJ to fight for us in his place.
>
> **If you can, help us hit this crucial goal by making your first donation today.**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9d/710658557/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9c/710658557/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e93/710658557/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e92/710658557/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e91/710658557/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__")**
> \-- Team MJ
>
>
>
> *If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.
>
>
>
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e9e/710658557/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200416.2nd__1231__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e90/710658557/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1231&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489034f/7f51f7bc/4f68aabf/4ef12e97/710658557/VEsHBg/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Allen Chen
subject: learning more about our potential GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Fundraising reports are out and here's what we've learned about our potential GOP opponent.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/bgTxOcG33jDRl1HQtRRrFunCFbo9D9oTQZ6bw_2bW9o=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/5sIo2_5t8ZMcST9_LgRIrWtNOa-Bq6ildXVaE-ebrlE=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

Fundraising reports are out and here's what we've learned about our potential GOP opponent.

**As of now, Kathaleen Wall has pumped $4.5 million dollars in personal loans to her campaign --_and more is likely to follow._** [**DONATE NOW TO SHOW YOU 'RE ON TEAM SRI!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/_alXHlKlRJ_VHHe_98oqGCD9z9idYN1ozAvE_iF1LW4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=15) | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/bgTxOcG33jDRl1HQtRRrFunCFbo9D9oTQZ6bw_2bW9o=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=5)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/bgTxOcG33jDRl1HQtRRrFunCFbo9D9oTQZ6bw_2bW9o=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=25)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/bgTxOcG33jDRl1HQtRRrFunCFbo9D9oTQZ6bw_2bW9o=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=50)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/bgTxOcG33jDRl1HQtRRrFunCFbo9D9oTQZ6bw_2bW9o=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=100)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/cpi1CJfvIFhUV_95r8k-nwxIPchWNQponlvHBsK3tWA=/bgTxOcG33jDRl1HQtRRrFunCFbo9D9oTQZ6bw_2bW9o=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.16_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

Kathaleen Wall is looking to ensure her interests are put above the community's -- plain and simple, team.

With millions of dollars in personal checks and **a small-dollar donor rate of less than 0.0%, Wall is running a pay-to-play campaign to get her into Congress.**

Wall is just another mega-donor looking to buy influence and protect her own special interests. Her campaign isn't about helping everyday Texans -- it's about power and prestige.

name: Congressman Drew Ferguson
subject: Political Sabotage

body:
Friend,

As we go through a public health crisis together, Democrats continue to put partisan politics above all else.

Congressional Republicans want to provide immediate emergency relief and assistance to small businesses and their workers. Democrats are holding up funding for a relief package, just like they did with the passage of the CARES Act.

Small businesses need funds to survive through this crisis.

_**Pelosi and Schumer are DENYING small businesses across the nation the funds that they need.**_

Republicans want to get back to work and find a solution to help these small businesses and their workers.

Instead of returning to Congress, Pelosi and House Democrats decided that the House won't return until early May.

name: Team Michelle
subject: Have you gotten a chance to sign our card yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Hey, have you signed our card for health care workers yet?

Every day, millions of brave health care professionals across the country are putting their health and safety on the line to fight against the COVID-19 pandemic. We've been collecting messages to share with them to show our gratitude. Here are just a few we've received:
_Thank you for your dedication to the well-being of our communities.
-Cindy

You are amazing and inspirational! Thank you for your courage, commitment, and compassion!
-Susan

Forever in your debt. Thank you for being there for us.
-Sylvan_

name: Maya Handa
subject: Casting your absentee ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
You might not realize it, but our election is fewer than 10 weeks away, on June 23rd. Due to the public health emergency caused by COVID-19, every voter will be able to request a no-excuse absentee ballot | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL3iNtYr2M93i1m9J73r1PfewBNrLzQNZtPquD7Ua-2Bk6TjuLT3Nk94jdBdRRG-2BXHAdWTvHXptrha95SxEyjVEY-2BWziSkWIXVVp0ptmXOGwMrql2y01y621vN966Nm0cL3NWDlJssXljj1XdwfwHJA4RSPQybHXzawaO4A2N-2FDTkvDATlfmB4vtc456CIdk4mq6aKp8Sm0QPOCkUDNhFrwtPpFkFFo-2BHx-2FY66DjFtUHVEHq8Zx3EekjMQmxWqgXx6Ts-3D/lI1i) Friend, **** **** **** You might not realize it, **_but our election is fewer than 10 weeks away_** , on June 23rd. Due to the public health emergency caused by COVID-19, every voter will be able to request a **_no-excuse_** absentee ballot to safely vote from home.
Casting an absentee ballot can be done in just 3 easy steps:
1\. **_[Click the link here to download and print your absentee ballot request form](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h1/z8ontqBYQdq-2BMZk-2FhAh3W76GlJE-2F8W0QO6-2FJX5Fgy-2BCDpDdyJaG6G99-2FcCCC8NzQ0JEQD1qWWtEF5Ko1fTOZBdi4nrU33UiHm5H3BzmLeKMrD5SKaar-2FnaTIBTcYwpG8CQx3AqIVR2iLdThpoKVXArW-2FhwMj0xn4RWmNA89labFdc-2FI8P-2BwzdvFDpSwFkG8S5bZ1x-2B5cWCDG8P3dqmI932Q8gVW07iy1iuMlkBbywtUFJ6kza7R9lqJOe2mdXJWV2gxy8Wx-2FyDMGoROWOs1EqSJp5X1fs4D6DyqpQpoloJvlbBbIxa-2BeWlLpfT8w1KyonSW-2FOG-2FdSGWijHSikrLkaQ-3D-3D/YpW7)_** , which you can fill out in the safety of your own home (**_[versión en español aquí](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h2/z8ontqBYQdq-2BMZk-2FhAh3W76GlJE-2F8W0QO6-2FJX5Fgy-2BCDpDdyJaG6G99-2FcCCC8NzQ0JEQD1qWWtEF5Ko1fTOZBYMKZ-2FN5asRQE2KQQHhit7hMEMd9OvwJ5tSx2zPvvWpt5begXpPOCggDLaG9Lxjv1fJaBqqEo416mnnd7-2FIVRmDZgfw3vvC3JxN76tnylvBeCJr8tam-2BgmsiiSSUqcDjwnI7D2zWB5Y6QSXG8fVnJleVuAAkR-2FEzKp8UgtcQEQSaO9Y8C3PnKWRr9te3lzEHC0n0zRrL1C14mivqbJnne2pbih7Lv-2BlDjuL15DTtkbsMo4Bkcx0UDu55yRf9-2BoXehQ-3D-3D/0orq)_**). You should mark “temporary illness” as the reason you are requesting the ballot.
2\. Return your request form to your County Board of Elections no later than 7 days before the election if being returned by mail or email, and no later than the day before the election if being delivered in person.
Rockland County Board of Elections, 11 New Hempstead Road, New City, NY 10956 or voterinfo@co.rockland.ny.us
or
Westchester County Board of Elections, 25 Quarropas St., White Plains, NY 10601 or boe-westabsentee@westchestergov.com
3\. Receive your ballot and vote Mondaire Jones for Congress! The completed ballot must be postmarked by the day before the election, or, if submitted in person, before polls close on the day of the election.
Most people aren’t used to absentee voting, so it’s crucial that we get the word out to everyone about it. Can I count on you to do one thing today? **_Can you forward this email to five friends in New York’s 17th Congressional District and make sure they know how to request an absentee ballot this election?_**
If you really want to make sure every single voter knows how to cast a ballot this election, **_[you can also sign up to connect with voters and let them know how to vote absentee and why they should vote for Mondaire!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h3/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGnKKu-2BoG4-2BOsx2bcmEQ-2FBUMQBNIvQEjsBJWyDyf6ullkQIXBHpTqfx2A4rBnN5LJXJqtl2APBHlxmDtQwhuWGqBW-2BDTGnIUBbK7FCo3hRAAwuKJndJq52s88kaJ1-2F7z-2FzeJi4yGhtHtGnwDb1knVkRQcv0-2BlfYJhc3uMR-2BXljxd4J3BDcVB-2BI4SrUIPV8BHspFOQr2on-2FFl6q-2B9jrg-2FclfgUR-2Fav9rUMmokRsoFl-2FmxtTIdcjpFAnX9OibcQdS0kH0vYOswWrg8N8X527SqmJ7A-3D/Tubz)_**
Thank you! Maya Handa, Digital Organizing Director
[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h4/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8AsJlRvyv3gSneUqeLKLznBCoz42UjHRg-2F9mAL1dFJ3ZZLzZdRYOoh1hLqB5rZpfXyI4EkxoaQB080Jhl9QnHjnfe9T8DIxH8PIkL33ehvktEBV7S5ny0wM2Oza1IANSJB6IB17FryAc6I8bH7sWJe4boL-2B2mNRJ5R8JyR6PNQzhRRkVNIbnN521A1GVEuro8LSL6cU4vTytokvh16pjujifxIxD-2Flz5IuzV9QARQasu-2BOUC5QMLnrewUypOG41ufg-3D-3D/aS_1) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h5/tX6tdXlLuYnKkE2jZWciQUs1NelnZQ77h2lAz4D56MKHwSUyZQWx7qVCjFcDqaloBuebbm3HJ0d-2B5-2FYxxdoKwVOBabDdnsV2tGcSjbvcxR3iGs-2FVigfjuW4-2BoeO2bq4jeDaBtGPOifFSGO-2FNwdxEcc2u6IBs6zM0lRnTta7rX0h77LQF6TOidI-2Fve6agyGrqEp4c1tqjErnWtCWQDj7eh6YMFSjhFimJo9xw-2BPPVYaggLeqfzoMph8Pfei0cPd4-2BbTEXmLGoSp0cVLplQUcZ0w-3D-3D/Osi4) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.30z/7DIklSIUSxKSYgQar71Ukw/h6/UgaStWBIiLYn8eevue7q8FAhcGqAoYLOwsOn0RlPD886rRcJZIsaAG91B3gZr9Se0rl7E6sVthVxyzbEXp-2Fbn-2FhHir0O0SxILqgq5UTDTiOwN9khP7lVnMRY8rHf6luLftr7xEVwlbcuiduldPmRsYMHiCWfUA5lkiwksQqd2UEbfuHbuSvKtnXRVDhYseAxT3hs0n-2BsNGTXDZR3q3nd1YvwzCy-2Fq9Biqr3xW985-2FuauHFLLb4XjzGlt9ajj10Vc9pZZ-2Bsb5H4s2ExLctKJK0WPKwspqWt3YlXc6Eti3b5c-3D/4LtT)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friends — Thanks to you, we’ve helped raise nearly $40,000 for organizations on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. The donations we’ve raised from charitable emails like this have gone directly to the people who need them most. That’s why I’m asking once again if you’d be willing to give a few of your hard-earned dollars to a great cause — but only if you can afford it. **Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank** and **Meals on Wheels America** have been serving Minnesota families during this unprecedented time. These nonprofits are in great need of resources to help those most impacted by the coronavirus pandemic in our communities. I know I can count on this team to help keep this energy up to continue helping these organizations do their important work. So, I’m turning to you again: **[Please, consider splitting a donation between Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank and Meals on Wheels. Thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17167599/184909568/816851843?refcode=em200416-charity&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDA3ODkyYi0zYjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6xxgInNBW1D4Euw9x3TudIaPQuX_x1EzMCt6RS_TgM=)** | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17167600/184909569/816851843?refcode=em200416-charity&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDA3ODkyYi0zYjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6xxgInNBW1D4Euw9x3TudIaPQuX_x1EzMCt6RS_TgM=)

I am so grateful you are a part of this team. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
— Tina

clean_body: | Friends — Thanks to you, we’ve helped raise nearly $40,000 for organizations on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. The donations we’ve raised from charitable emails like this have gone directly to the people who need them most. That’s why I’m asking once again if you’d be willing to give a few of your hard-earned dollars to a great cause — but only if you can afford it. Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank and Meals on Wheels America have been serving Minnesota families during this unprecedented time. These nonprofits are in great need of resources to help those most impacted by the coronavirus pandemic in our communities. I know I can count on this team to help keep this energy up to continue helping these organizations do their important work. So, I’m turning to you again: = | = I am so grateful you are a part of this team. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

subject: Did you see James' message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Please read it before midnight ->
|
---

| | Hey, I want to make sure you saw James' message before the mid-month deadline tonight. James is in this race for Tennesseans -- not the political agendas of Washington elites or special-interest groups. That's why he isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. [_**That means grassroots support is essential to the success of our campaign -- especially right now. So if you can, please chip in any amount at all before midnight tonight.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d6152a/1139933275/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?refcode=jme200416_m&recurring=true") Thanks, Dave Sent from my iPhone. Sorry for any typos. _\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: James Mackler_
_Date: Wed, Apr 15, 2020_ @jamesmackler.com> | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d6152a/1139933275/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?refcode=jme200416_m&recurring=true")
---
I have been working from home alongside my wife and two daughters and I'll be honest: It's been difficult to not be on the road -- especially not riding my motorcycle -- because it means I haven't been able to connect with Tennesseans in person as we all navigate these challenging times.
That means our online communication is more important than ever, and with so much going on in the country right now, I want to bring it back to why I got into this race in the first place.
I was motivated to run for the Senate for reasons similar to the ones that motivated me to join the army after 9/11.
When I joined the army, our country was facing a crisis. I felt it was my duty as an American to do more, so I closed my law practice at 30 years old and stepped forward to serve my country.
**We 're facing a crisis now, too -- not only a crisis of health and economic security but also a crisis of leadership. Tennessee and our whole country are depending on strong leaders now more than ever.**
[_**If you can, chip in before the mid-month deadline tomorrow to send a strong leader to fight for Tennessee in the Senate.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d6152a/1139933275/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?refcode=jme200416_m&recurring=true")
Our leaders in Washington are coming up short. They're letting partisan divisions get in the way of addressing our country's biggest issues -- issues that require timely and decisive action.
It's unacceptable -- especially at a time like this.
Washington is broken, and I'm running because it's my duty to step forward and serve all Tennesseans in a time of crisis so we can solve the problems holding us back.
[_**Please chip in before midnight tomorrow ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d6152a/1139933275/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?refcode=jme200416_m&recurring=true")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d6152b/1139933275/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200416_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d61528/1139933275/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jme200416_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d61529/1139933275/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jme200416_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d61516/1139933275/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?refcode=jme200416_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Pundits say winning in Tennessee will be hard, but I've never shied away from difficult missions. As a combat veteran and a prosecutor, I've spent my entire career tackling tough challenges head-on.
As Tennessee's next senator, I promise to be a strong leader who is honest, direct, accountable, and unafraid. Because that's the kind of leader we need right now.
[_**In order to get there though, I 'm counting on grassroots support. I understand that not all families can afford to make contributions right now, and that's OK, but if you are able to spare a few dollars, please consider chipping in before our mid-month deadline tomorrow.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa168/18d6a294/4cb29837/26d6152a/1139933275/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200416?refcode=jme200416_m&recurring=true")
In service,
James

|

---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. | | Peter --

Donald Trump completely botched our country's response to the coronavirus.

And Mike Garcia continues to call him a good president.

Trump claimed to have this crisis "under control." He called the pandemic a hoax. He said the risk to Americans was low. He said he's not responsible for the mess our country is in.

Mike Garcia has said time and again that he will stand behind Trump fully, without reservation.

**Peter -- this is why we can't let Mike Garcia win this seat.** We need leaders who will stand up to Trump when he's wrong, who will listen to science and facts, and who will vote based on what their district needs -- not someone who will be a rubber stamp.

**[We've got less than 4 weeks to hold on to this seat and keep Garcia out of Congress. Chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help elect Christy Smith, a leader who will stand up to the president and will not let him get away with this.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b896/29776869/a34027c/569f593a/3361657220/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTZfZ2FyY2lhdmlkZW8tczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200416_garciavideo-s2")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b896/29776869/a34027c/569f593b/3361657220/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTZfZ2FyY2lhdmlkZW8tczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200416_garciavideo-s2&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b896/29776869/a34027c/569f5934/3361657220/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTZfZ2FyY2lhdmlkZW8tczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200416_garciavideo-s2&express_lane=true&amount=25")

|
#
Real quick — Well-funded Republican groups are raising virtually unlimited sums of money for Cory Gardner. Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just announced **$67 million** worth of advertising targeting key Senate races like ours, and the National Republican Senatorial Committee announced another **$33 million** in ads on top of that! **Plus, we’re up against a serious cash-on-hand disadvantage.** Washington Republicans are seeing the same polls we’re seeing. They know Gardner is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in 2020. subject: Rep. Dana Criswell Coronavirus Update - April 16, 2020
body:
Coronavirus Update - April 16, 2020 by Rep. Dana Criswell|

| | |

**Mississippi Coronavirus Update
April 16, 2020**
| |
---
| | | |
---
Date: April 16, 2020
Re: COVID-19 April 16 Update **Can an employee refuse to return to work because they can draw more in unemployment benefits than they earn in wages?**
* We have been asked about a situation where an employer offers employees the opportunity to come back to work but they refuse on the grounds that they can make more money drawing unemployment right now.
* We would advise anyone who has a mind to do this to not do this.
* It seems to be very clear under Mississippi law that a refusal to return to work under these circumstances would be deemed a failure to return to work without good cause. This would disqualify a worker from receiving unemployment benefits under Mississippi law and would cause them to lose the federal benefits also, which require them to be able and available to work. The Department of Labor has actually characterized it as fraud in recent UIPL guidance.

**Drive-in Church Services Can Continue**
* Many of you may have seen that the town of Greenville attempted to prevent a church from engaging in drive-in church services.
* As we have discussed before, such services are acceptable as long as people adhere to the health and safety regulations issued by the Department of Health and the CDC. By all accounts, the church was doing exactly that.
* Nevertheless, the city sent policemen to the church to hand out $500 tickets in the parking lot while people were worshipping in their cars.
* This is clearly unacceptable and a violation of the constitutional right to the freedom of worship.
* The church took legal action and the city backed down.
* As we have said many times, drive-in church services are perfectly acceptable as long as the social distancing guidelines are observed.
* I want to commend the churches around this state who continue to meet and who voluntarily respect the wishes of the Department of Health to observe social distancing guidelines during this crisis. They are clearly acting out of consideration and love for their neighbor by doing this.
* I also want to commend the city mayors and other leaders who are respecting the rights of their citizens to worship and allowing churches to meet within the guidelines and are not trying to stop worship.
* It appears this action in Greenville was nothing more than a misguided political stunt by the mayor.

**Burn Ban**
* Yesterday the State Forester sent a letter to the Governor asking that the burn ban be lifted.
* I am led to believe the Governor will honor his request and lift the burn ban immediately. Watch for this development in the next couple of days.

**Money for Airports**
* The federal government announced yesterday that certain airports around Mississippi will receive grants to help alleviate the decline in revenue they have experienced as a result of flights being canceled due to the coronavirus epidemic.
* The grants are as follows:
* Gulfport-Biloxi International Airport, Gulfport – $20,929,795
* Jackson-Medgar Wiley Evers International Airport, Jackson – $8,561,630
* Golden Triangle Regional Airport, Columbus – $1,190,282
* Key Field, Meridian – $1,079,543
* Tupelo Regional Airport, Tupelo – $1,055,781
* Other airports receiving grants were: Aberdeen ($30,000), Belmont ($20,000), Booneville ($20,000), Corinth ($30,000), Holly Springs ($20,000), Iuka ($30,000), New Albany ($30,000), Okolona ($30,000), Oxford ($69,000), Pontotoc ($30,000), Ripley ($20,000), Starkville ($69,000), Water Valley ($1,000) and West Point ($20,000)

** Update on number of cases.**
* 264 new cases reported yesterday.
* Total cases statewide now number 3,624.
* Unfortunately, we now have 129 deaths.
* 65 outbreaks in long-term care facilities
* Counties that reported a death today:
* Adams (1)
* Carroll (1)
* Copiah (1)
* Humphreys (1)
* Lincoln (2)
* Monroe (1)

**Call if you need help.** We have had phone calls to our office forwarded to our staff. If you need any help at all, please call us at 601-359-3300.
We have also set up an email address for you to ask questions or seek help. That address is [covid19questions@house.ms.gov](mailto:covid19questions@house.ms.gov?subject=Covid%20Questions).
