name: Joe Biden
subject: I'm personally asking you, Derek​:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Three years into his presidency, it could not be more clear that Donald Trump is unfit for the job. | |
---
It could not be more clear that Donald Trump is unfit to be our president. Right now, our country is in the midst of a public health emergency that has profoundly impacted how we live our lives today and what things will look like in the future. **This crisis has illuminated how important the next 201 days are for our country.** Our health, our safety, and our economy are on the line, and this president simply isn’t up to the task. Now more than ever, we must commit to unity and to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. The best way to do that is by supporting the Democratic Unity Fund, which was launched by President Obama and the DNC to support Democratic candidates at every level this year. None of us -- myself included -- will be able to take on Trump and his allies alone. That's why I'm asking for your support today: **Donate $10 to my campaign and the Democratic Unity Fund to help build the infrastructure we’ll need to win across the map.**

clean_body: Three years into his presidency, it could not be more clear that Donald Trump is unfit for the job. | | It could not be more clear that Donald Trump is unfit to be our president. Right now, our country is in the midst of a public health emergency that has profoundly impacted how we live our lives today and what things will look like in the future. This crisis has illuminated how important the next 201 days are for our country. Our health, our safety, and our economy are on the line, and this president simply isn’t up to the task. Now more than ever, we must commit to unity and to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. The best way to do that is by supporting the Democratic Unity Fund, which was launched by President Obama and the DNC to support Democratic candidates at every level this year. None of us -- myself included -- will be able to take on Trump and his allies alone. That's why I'm asking for your support today: Donate $10 to my campaign and the Democratic Unity Fund to help build the infrastructure we’ll need to win across the map. - What our nation desperately needs right now is not division or anger, but a recognition that we as Americans have more in common than what divides us. We’re so much stronger united than we are apart. That is the core idea behind the Democratic Unity Fund. When you support the fund, you're supporting Democratic candidates fighting the good fight in every corner of this country. The DNC is hiring organizers and upgrading our tech and data capabilities -- both of which will put Democrats far ahead of where we've been in previous election years. But we can't make these much-needed investments without you. Thanks for being on this team, Joe

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: I'm all in for Georgia's future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The American dream is out of reach for too many.
| | |
---
| | |
---
Friend,
I want to talk to you for a minute about the American dream.
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I was a poor kid with 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I _never_ thought that a kid like me would have a chance to become a U.S. senator. But my mom and dad taught me the value of hard work and determination, always believing that you could do anything you set your mind to.
I've carried this lesson with me throughout my entire life: From the projects, I went on to earn a college degree, and 14 years ago, I was chosen to serve as senior pastor at Dr. King's spiritual home.**Now? I 'm running for Senate to give a voice to the voiceless and make history as the first black senator ever elected from Georgia. **
But here's the truth, friend: The path that I took to my American dream is increasingly out of reach for so many Georgians - and the opportunities I worked for are fewer and farther between for too many of us.
**That 's why I'm in this fight for Georgia's Senate seat: My commitment to serving others doesn't stop at the church door - it starts there. We are in a fight for the soul of our democracy, and if we're going to return moral leadership to Washington, we need to flip Georgia blue this November. **
**[Will you make a contribution of $5 now to help me win? Every single dollar makes a difference in our campaign to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e75d/288179be/a21454e/348e86dc/1877510745/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTM3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
We're hearing from experts like Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight and _The Washington Post_ that Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but not if we lose in Georgia. Right now, my wealthy Republican opponent, Kelly Loeffler, is pouring _$20 million_ of her own fortune into this race to defeat me, and a Trump-linked super PAC just named this state one of its TOP targets of the cycle.
The fact of the matter is that Senate control could all come down to what happens here in Georgia - and with polls showing us in a dead-heat with my McConnell-backed opponent, we simply can't afford to fall behind our fundraising goals and miss our chance to take back the Senate.
We can take on Mitch McConnell, fight for working people _and_ restore the American dream for all Georgians - but it all depends on grassroots supporters like _you_.
**That 's why we've set a goal to raise $35,000 by midnight tomorrow to make sure we have what it takes to fight back against the GOP's millions and keep powering our movement forward. And if you believe in the American dream like I do, I'm counting on you to help us get there.**
**[So please, friend, if you're ready to flip Georgia blue and fight for the American dream, will you give $5 or more right now to help us meet this goal and take back the Senate? Whether or not we hit our mid-month goal by our crucial midnight deadline could mean the difference between winning and losing in November. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e75d/288179be/a21454e/348e86dc/1877510745/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTM3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you - I'm tremendously grateful for your support.
Reverend Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e75d/288179be/a21454e/348e86dc/1877510745/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTM3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e75d/288179be/a21454e/348e86dd/1877510745/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

name: Warren Democrats
subject: re: Pennsylvania's primary election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The upcoming elections will decide the future of this country -- and determine when and how this crisis will end. We need leaders who will fight for working people as we brave this pandemic and... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cc/45c30650/1f5db608f/66e96dd0/1676071666/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
The coronavirus pandemic has thrown our communities, our jobs, and our economy into upheaval -- and we can't let it threaten our elections, too.

**[Pennsylvania's primary election is coming up on Tuesday, June 2, and-- for the first time -- any voter can choose to vote by mail-in ballot rather than go to their polling place on election day. Click here to request your mail-in ballot today.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cc/45c30650/1f5db608f/66e96dd3/1676071666/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin")** | [**REQUEST YOUR MAIL-IN BALLOT**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cc/45c30650/1f5db608f/66e96dd3/1676071666/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin")
---
This couldn't be more important. The upcoming elections will decide the future of this country -- and determine when and how this crisis will end. We need leaders who will fight for working people as we brave this pandemic and rebuild our economy in the months ahead.

**[All you have to do is request your mail-in ballot online, wait for it to arrive in your mailbox, cast your vote, and return it.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cc/45c30650/1f5db608f/66e96dd3/1676071666/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin")**

The upcoming elections will be the fight of our lives -- and you have a critical part to play. Make sure you're ready to make your voice heard by requesting your mail-in ballot today.

Thanks for all you do,

Warren Democrats

[**REQUEST YOUR MAIL-IN BALLOT**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257cc/45c30650/1f5db608f/66e96dd3/1676071666/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin")
---

| | Peter, you may have seen it in the headlines (or in your bank account) but stimulus checks are starting to arrive in the pockets of Americans who need it most. **This relief is desperately needed as folks across the country are experiencing the economic hardships brought on by the ongoing international pandemic.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f7/72412298/4e15c380/6104ee04/394104496/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1") **[We need 10,000 strong Democrats like you to add their name to a thank you card for Senate Democrats -- will you be one of our 10,000 signers??](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f7/72412298/4e15c380/6104ee07/394104496/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+We+need+10000+strong+Democrats+like+you+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1")** | | | [Add your name here>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f7/72412298/4e15c380/6104ee06/394104496/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+heregtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1")
---
**We 're thanking them for their leadership in delivering economic relief for those most vulnerable and for continually standing up for working Americans!**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f7/72412298/4e15c380/6104ee09/394104496/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1")
**The important work Senate Dems are doing is long from over! We MUST show them that we 're with them 100% as they fight for more relief in the coming weeks and months.**
So please, let's reach our goal 10,000 signature goal for Senate Dems -- **[add your name to our thank you card now!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f7/72412298/4e15c380/6104ee08/394104496/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+add+your+name+to+our+thank+you+card+now&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1")**
Thanks in advance!
\-- the Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f7/72412298/4e15c380/6104ee0b/394104496/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200416_ThanksDems_U1_X1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s Guidelines for Opening Up America Again!
body:
Thanks to you, President Trump’s aggressive strategy to beat Coronavirus is working. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c1ec42238&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 16, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s Guidelines for Opening Up America Again!**

**Thanks to you,** President Trump’s aggressive strategy to beat Coronavirus is working.

**A quarter** **of U.S. counties** have no Coronavirus cases reported. Half of American states have fewer than 2,500 cases total. New infections are declining across the New York metro area, as well as in the closely watched Houston and New Orleans communities.

**While Americans **must remain vigilant in following [President Trump's Coronavirus Guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=038e614213&e=3ee4985eea), the data suggests we have passed a nationwide peak on new cases. This progress means it’s time to help states prepare for how to reopen our country.

**Today, President Trump **unveiled just that: [Guidelines for Opening Up America Again!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f4f3a3eb2&e=3ee4985eea) White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany explains:
| | _The guidance being put out today is in line with what the experts are saying. It’s in line with what the data is showing. And it’s a plan to put this economy back on track—put the economy back on track to the hottest in modern history that President Trump created and also protect American lives._ |
---|---|---

**Reopening America**** ** won’t happen everywhere overnight. President Trump’s plan calls for a phased return, outlining specific steps for state and local officials to follow in tailoring their response. The criteria include showing a downward trajectory of COVID-like symptoms reported over 14 days in a given state or region, as well as a decline in documented cases or positive tests during the same 14-day window.

**A region’s hospital** and healthcare system capacity is another important factor. The President’s guidelines specify that hospitals be able to treat all patients _without_ crisis care before a state or region reopens for business. Robust testing programs, including emerging antibody testing, should be in place to protect at-risk healthcare workers.

**When America reopens,** core state preparedness responsibilities won’t change. The ability to set up safe, efficient screening and testing sites remains essential. States will continue to advise citizens on protocols for social distancing and use of face coverings.

**No matter** the situation in your state, all Americans must keep up the fight against this virus. Continue to practice strict personal hygiene, including frequently washing your hands and disinfecting commonly used items and surfaces. People who feel sick should stay home and follow the advice of their medical providers. Employers should follow industry best practices on social distancing, sanitation, travel, and use of shared spaces.

**This war isn’t over** , but it can and will be won. “We want to get our country back,” President Trump says. “And we’re going to do it, and we’re going to do it soon.”

[See President Trump’s Guidelines for Opening Up America Again!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6cc19c9669&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.whitehouse.gov/openingamerica/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d")

🎬 **WATCH** : [All of America is mobilized against this invisible enemy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6dd6c12408&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|

|
---
| **President Trump and Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao celebrate America’s truckers on the White House’s South Lawn** | April 16, 2020
---
